strategy.note: Extracted a balanced set of key words, phrases, and sentences from the classical novel text, focusing on recurring terms like 花果山 (Flower-Fruit Mountain), 石猴 (Stone Monkey), and 美猴王 (Handsome Monkey King), key verb phrases involving actions of Stone Monkey and the monkeys, and important sentences that reflect themes, narrative moments, and idiomatic expressions relevant for language learners in a mythology/fantasy context.

candidates.sourceText: 祖师闻言，咄的一声，跳下高台，手持戒尺，指定悟空道：“你这猢狲，这般不学，那般不学，却待怎么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, the master snorted, jumped down from the platform, holding a disciplinary ruler, and said to wukong: 'you monkey, refusing to learn this and that, what do you intend?

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王喝道：“这泼魔这般眼大，看不见老孙。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王喝道：“这泼魔这般眼大，看不见老孙。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: monkey king shouted: "this rude demon with eyes so big cannot see old sun."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空急撤身，他砍了一个空。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空急撤身，他砍了一个空。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong quickly withdrew, he chopped at empty air.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空闻说，心中大怒，道：“是甚么妖魔，辄敢无状？你且细细说来，待我寻他报仇。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空闻说，心中大怒，道：“是甚么妖魔，辄敢无状？你且细细说来，待我寻他报仇。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, wukong was furious and said: "what kind of demon dares be so outrageous? tell me carefully, i will go seek revenge."

candidates.canonicalSource: 盖闻天地之数，有十二万九千六百岁为一元。
candidates.sourceText: 盖闻天地之数，有十二万九千六百岁为一元。
candidates.conceptCanonical: it is said that the count of heaven and earth consists of 129,600 years as one full cycle.

candidates.canonicalSource: 将一元分为十二会，乃子、丑、寅、卯、辰、巳、午、未、申、酉、戌、亥之十二支也。
candidates.sourceText: 将一元分为十二会，乃子、丑、寅、卯、辰、巳、午、未、申、酉、戌、亥之十二支也。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this cycle is divided into twelve segments, known as the twelve earthly branches: zi, chou, yin, mao, chen, si, wu, wei, shen, you, xu, and hai.

candidates.canonicalSource: 每会该一万八百岁。
candidates.sourceText: 每会该一万八百岁。
candidates.conceptCanonical: each segment lasts 18,000 years.

candidates.canonicalSource: 且就一日而论：子时得阳气，而丑则鸡鸣；寅不通光，而卯则日出；辰时食后，而巳则挨排；日午天中，而未则西蹉；申时晡，而日落酉，戌黄昏，而人定亥。
candidates.sourceText: 且就一日而论：子时得阳气，而丑则鸡鸣；寅不通光，而卯则日出；辰时食后，而巳则挨排；日午天中，而未则西蹉；申时晡，而日落酉，戌黄昏，而人定亥。
candidates.conceptCanonical: considering a single day: at the hour of zi, yang energy arises; at chou, the rooster crows; at yin, there is no sunlight; at mao, the sun rises; at chen, people have their meal; at si, it’s time to rest; at midday (wu), the sun is at its peak; at wei, the sun moves westward; at shen, it is evening; at you, the sun sets; at xu, twilight falls; and at hai, all is still.

candidates.canonicalSource: 譬于大数，若到戌会之终，则天地昏曚而万物否矣。
candidates.sourceText: 譬于大数，若到戌会之终，则天地昏曚而万物否矣。
candidates.conceptCanonical: imagine vast cycles; when the xu segment ends, heaven and earth darken, and all things perish.

candidates.canonicalSource: 再去五千四百岁，交亥会之初，则当黑暗，而两间人物俱无矣，故曰混沌。
candidates.sourceText: 再去五千四百岁，交亥会之初，则当黑暗，而两间人物俱无矣，故曰混沌。
candidates.conceptCanonical: five thousand four hundred years later, at the beginning of the hai segment, there is darkness, and all beings vanish between these periods — hence called chaos.

candidates.canonicalSource: 又五千四百岁，亥会将终，贞下起元，近子之会，而复逐渐开明。
candidates.sourceText: 又五千四百岁，亥会将终，贞下起元，近子之会，而复逐渐开明。
candidates.conceptCanonical: another 5,400 years later, as hai nears its end and the cycle approaches zi again, clarity slowly returns.

candidates.canonicalSource: 邵康节曰：“冬至子之半，天心无改移。
candidates.sourceText: 邵康节曰：“冬至子之半，天心无改移。
candidates.conceptCanonical: as shao kangjie stated: “at the midpoint of zi during the winter solstice, the celestial center remains unmoved.

candidates.canonicalSource: 一阳初动处，万物未生时。”
candidates.sourceText: 一阳初动处，万物未生时。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: this is where the first motion of yang begins, before all things are born.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 到此，天始有根。
candidates.sourceText: 到此，天始有根。
candidates.conceptCanonical: at this point, heaven begins to have a foundation.

candidates.canonicalSource: 再五千四百岁，正当子会，轻清上腾，有日，有月，有星，有辰。
candidates.sourceText: 再五千四百岁，正当子会，轻清上腾，有日，有月，有星，有辰。
candidates.conceptCanonical: another 5,400 years pass until the start of the zi segment, when lightness rises; there is the sun, the moon, the stars, and constellations.

candidates.canonicalSource: 日、月、星、辰，谓之四象。
candidates.sourceText: 日、月、星、辰，谓之四象。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the sun, moon, stars, and constellations are called the four symbols.

candidates.canonicalSource: 故曰，天开于子。
candidates.sourceText: 故曰，天开于子。
candidates.conceptCanonical: thus, it is said that heaven opens at zi.

candidates.canonicalSource: 又经五千四百岁，子会将终，近丑之会，而逐渐坚实。
candidates.sourceText: 又经五千四百岁，子会将终，近丑之会，而逐渐坚实。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after another 5,400 years, as zi ends and chou approaches, solidity gradually forms.

candidates.canonicalSource: 《易》曰：“大哉乾元！
candidates.sourceText: 《易》曰：“大哉乾元！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the "yi jing" states: “great is the primal force of qian!

candidates.canonicalSource: 至哉坤元！
candidates.sourceText: 至哉坤元！
candidates.conceptCanonical: exalted is the primal force of kun!

candidates.canonicalSource: 万物资生，乃顺承天。”
candidates.sourceText: 万物资生，乃顺承天。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: all things are born from this foundation, following the will of heaven.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 至此，地始凝结。
candidates.sourceText: 至此，地始凝结。
candidates.conceptCanonical: at this stage, earth begins to consolidate.

candidates.canonicalSource: 再五千四百岁，正当丑会，重浊下凝，有水，有火，有山，有石，有土。
candidates.sourceText: 再五千四百岁，正当丑会，重浊下凝，有水，有火，有山，有石，有土。
candidates.conceptCanonical: going forward yet another 5,400 years until chou, heaviness and turbidity settle below; water, fire, mountains, stones, and earth appear.

candidates.canonicalSource: 水、火、山、石、土，谓之五形。
candidates.sourceText: 水、火、山、石、土，谓之五形。
candidates.conceptCanonical: water, fire, mountains, stones, and earth are called the five forms.

candidates.canonicalSource: 故曰，地辟于丑。
candidates.sourceText: 故曰，地辟于丑。
candidates.conceptCanonical: therefore, it is said that earth is shaped at chou.

candidates.canonicalSource: 又经五千四百岁，丑会终而寅会之初，发生万物。
candidates.sourceText: 又经五千四百岁，丑会终而寅会之初，发生万物。
candidates.conceptCanonical: another 5,400 years pass, chou ends and yin begins; all things come into being.

candidates.canonicalSource: 历曰：“天气下降，地气上升；天地交合，群物皆生。”
candidates.sourceText: 历曰：“天气下降，地气上升；天地交合，群物皆生。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the calendar says: “heaven’s qi descends, earth’s qi ascends; heaven and earth unite, and all creatures are born.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 至此，天清地爽，阴阳交合。
candidates.sourceText: 至此，天清地爽，阴阳交合。
candidates.conceptCanonical: at this moment, heaven is clear and earth refreshing; yin and yang combine.

candidates.canonicalSource: 再五千四百岁，正当寅会，生人，生兽，生禽，正谓天地人，三才定位。
candidates.sourceText: 再五千四百岁，正当寅会，生人，生兽，生禽，正谓天地人，三才定位。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after yet another 5,400 years, during yin, humans, beasts, and birds are born — this is the establishment of heaven, earth, and humanity as the three powers.

candidates.canonicalSource: 故曰，人生于寅。
candidates.sourceText: 故曰，人生于寅。
candidates.conceptCanonical: hence, it is said that humans are born at yin.

candidates.canonicalSource: 感盘古开辟，三皇治世，五帝定伦，世界之间，遂分为四大部洲：曰东胜神洲，曰西牛贺洲，曰南赡部洲，曰北俱芦洲。
candidates.sourceText: 感盘古开辟，三皇治世，五帝定伦，世界之间，遂分为四大部洲：曰东胜神洲，曰西牛贺洲，曰南赡部洲，曰北俱芦洲。
candidates.conceptCanonical: recalling pangu’s creation, the three sovereigns’ governance, and the five emperors’ establishment of order, the world was divided into four great continents: the east shengshen continent, the west niuhes continent, the south zanbu continent, and the north julu continent.

candidates.canonicalSource: 这部书单表东胜神洲。
candidates.sourceText: 这部书单表东胜神洲。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this book concerns itself with the east shengshen continent.

candidates.canonicalSource: 海外有一国土，名曰傲来国。
candidates.sourceText: 海外有一国土，名曰傲来国。
candidates.conceptCanonical: overseas lies a nation called the proud coming country.

candidates.canonicalSource: 国近大海，海中有一座名山，唤为花果山。
candidates.sourceText: 国近大海，海中有一座名山，唤为花果山。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this nation is near the great sea; within the sea stands a famous mountain called flower-fruit mountain.

candidates.canonicalSource: 此山乃十洲之祖脉，三岛之来龙，自开清浊而立，鸿濛判后而成。
candidates.sourceText: 此山乃十洲之祖脉，三岛之来龙，自开清浊而立，鸿濛判后而成。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this mountain is the ancestral root of the ten continents and the dragon vein of the three islands, arising from the separation of clarity and turbidity, formed after the primal chaos.

candidates.canonicalSource: 真个好山！
candidates.sourceText: 真个好山！
candidates.conceptCanonical: truly a magnificent mountain!

candidates.canonicalSource: 有词赋为证。
candidates.sourceText: 有词赋为证。
candidates.conceptCanonical: there is a poem confirming this.

candidates.canonicalSource: 赋曰：
candidates.sourceText: 赋曰：
candidates.conceptCanonical: the poem says:

candidates.canonicalSource: 那座山正当顶上，有一块仙石。
candidates.sourceText: 那座山正当顶上，有一块仙石。
candidates.conceptCanonical: atop the mountain, there is a divine stone.

candidates.canonicalSource: 其石有三丈六尺五寸高，有二丈四尺围圆。
candidates.sourceText: 其石有三丈六尺五寸高，有二丈四尺围圆。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the stone stands three zhang, six chi, and five cun tall, and has a circumference of two zhang and four chi.

candidates.canonicalSource: 三丈六尺五寸高，按周天三百六十五度；二丈四尺围圆，按政历二十四气。
candidates.sourceText: 三丈六尺五寸高，按周天三百六十五度；二丈四尺围圆，按政历二十四气。
candidates.conceptCanonical: its height of three zhang six chi five cun corresponds to the 365 degrees of the celestial circle; its circumference of two zhang four chi aligns with the twenty-four solar terms.

candidates.canonicalSource: 上有九窍八孔，按九宫八卦。
candidates.sourceText: 上有九窍八孔，按九宫八卦。
candidates.conceptCanonical: it has nine apertures and eight holes, corresponding to the nine palaces and the eight trigrams.

candidates.canonicalSource: 四面更无树木遮阴，左右倒有芝兰相衬。
candidates.sourceText: 四面更无树木遮阴，左右倒有芝兰相衬。
candidates.conceptCanonical: no trees shade it on any side; rather, orchid and fragrant herbs accompany it on the left and right.

candidates.canonicalSource: 盖自开辟以来，每受天真地秀，日精月华，感之既久，遂有灵通之意。
candidates.sourceText: 盖自开辟以来，每受天真地秀，日精月华，感之既久，遂有灵通之意。
candidates.conceptCanonical: since the time of creation, it has received the essence of heaven and earth, the essence of the sun and moon; so long was the inspiration that it developed intelligence and awareness.

candidates.canonicalSource: 内育仙胞，一日迸裂，产一石卵，似圆球样大。
candidates.sourceText: 内育仙胞，一日迸裂，产一石卵，似圆球样大。
candidates.conceptCanonical: within it nurtured a celestial embryo, which one day cracked open, producing a stone egg about the size of a round ball.

candidates.canonicalSource: 因见风，化作一个石猴，五官俱备，四肢皆全。
candidates.sourceText: 因见风，化作一个石猴，五官俱备，四肢皆全。
candidates.conceptCanonical: blown by the wind, it transformed into a stone monkey, complete with facial features and limbs.

candidates.canonicalSource: 便就学爬学走，拜了四方。
candidates.sourceText: 便就学爬学走，拜了四方。
candidates.conceptCanonical: it immediately learned to crawl and walk, paying respects to all directions.

candidates.canonicalSource: 目运两道金光，射冲斗府。
candidates.sourceText: 目运两道金光，射冲斗府。
candidates.conceptCanonical: its eyes emitted two beams of golden light, shooting toward the dipper constellation.

candidates.canonicalSource: 惊动高天上圣大慈仁者玉皇大天尊玄穹高上帝，驾座金阙云宫灵霄宝殿，聚集仙卿，见有金光焰焰，即命千里眼、顺风耳开南天门观看。
candidates.sourceText: 惊动高天上圣大慈仁者玉皇大天尊玄穹高上帝，驾座金阙云宫灵霄宝殿，聚集仙卿，见有金光焰焰，即命千里眼、顺风耳开南天门观看。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this startled the jade emperor, the highest deity, who sat upon the golden palace in the cloud palace in the lingxiao hall. he summoned his celestial ministers, and upon seeing the flaming golden light, ordered the thousand-mile eye and the swift wind ear to open the southern heavenly gate and watch.

candidates.canonicalSource: 二将果奉旨出门外，看的真，听的明。
candidates.sourceText: 二将果奉旨出门外，看的真，听的明。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the two generals dutifully went outside; what they saw was clear, what they heard was distinct.

candidates.canonicalSource: 须臾回报道：“臣奉旨观听金光之处，乃东胜神洲海东傲来小国之界，有一座花果山，山上有一仙石，石产一卵，见风化一石猴，在那里拜四方，眼运金光，射冲斗府。
candidates.sourceText: 须臾回报道：“臣奉旨观听金光之处，乃东胜神洲海东傲来小国之界，有一座花果山，山上有一仙石，石产一卵，见风化一石猴，在那里拜四方，眼运金光，射冲斗府。
candidates.conceptCanonical: they soon returned and reported: “by imperial order, the golden light we observed is at the border of the proud coming kingdom in the east shengshen continent, atop flower-fruit mountain stands a divine stone that produced an egg, which in the wind transformed into a stone monkey. there, it pays respects to all directions and its eyes emit golden rays shooting at the dipper constellation.

candidates.canonicalSource: 如今服饵水食，金光将潜息矣。”
candidates.sourceText: 如今服饵水食，金光将潜息矣。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: now it feeds on water and food, and the golden light is about to fade.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 玉帝垂赐恩慈曰：“下方之物，乃天地精华所生，不足为异。”
candidates.sourceText: 玉帝垂赐恩慈曰：“下方之物，乃天地精华所生，不足为异。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the jade emperor graciously bestowed mercy and said: “the beings below are born from the essence of heaven and earth; there is nothing unusual.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 那猴在山中，却会行走跳跃，食草木，饮涧泉，采山花，觅树果；与狼虫为伴，虎豹为群，獐鹿为友，猕猿为亲；夜宿石崖之下，朝游峰洞之中。
candidates.sourceText: 那猴在山中，却会行走跳跃，食草木，饮涧泉，采山花，觅树果；与狼虫为伴，虎豹为群，獐鹿为友，猕猿为亲；夜宿石崖之下，朝游峰洞之中。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this monkey, living in the mountain, learned to walk and leap, fed on grass and trees, drank spring water, picked mountain flowers, and gathered tree fruits; it kept company with wolves and insects, roamed in groups with tigers and leopards, befriended deer and antelopes, and was close to macaques; it slept beneath stone cliffs at night and travelled among caves and peaks by day.

candidates.canonicalSource: 真是：“山中无甲子，寒尽不知年。”
candidates.sourceText: 真是：“山中无甲子，寒尽不知年。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: truly: “in the mountain no calendar is kept, the cold passes without knowing the years.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 一朝天气炎热，与群猴避暑，都在松阴之下顽耍。
candidates.sourceText: 一朝天气炎热，与群猴避暑，都在松阴之下顽耍。
candidates.conceptCanonical: one day, during a hot season, seeking respite with a troop of monkeys, they all played under the pine shade.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你看他一个个：
candidates.sourceText: 你看他一个个：
candidates.conceptCanonical: look at them all:

candidates.canonicalSource: 一群猴子耍了一会，却去那山涧中洗澡。
candidates.sourceText: 一群猴子耍了一会，却去那山涧中洗澡。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after playing for a while, the troop went to bathe in a mountain stream.

candidates.canonicalSource: 见那股涧水奔流，真个似滚瓜涌溅。
candidates.sourceText: 见那股涧水奔流，真个似滚瓜涌溅。
candidates.conceptCanonical: they saw the stream rushing and tumbling like boiling melons.

candidates.canonicalSource: 古云：“禽有禽言，兽有兽语。”
candidates.sourceText: 古云：“禽有禽言，兽有兽语。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: as the old saying goes: “birds speak their birds’ language, beasts have their own words.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴都道：“这股水不知是那里的水。
candidates.sourceText: 众猴都道：“这股水不知是那里的水。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop said: “this water must come from somewhere unknown.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我们今日赶闲无事，顺涧边往上溜头寻看源流，耍子去耶！”
candidates.sourceText: 我们今日赶闲无事，顺涧边往上溜头寻看源流，耍子去耶！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: today we are free of chores; let us follow the stream upstream to find its source and have some fun!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 喊一声，都拖男挈女，呼弟呼兄，一齐跑来，顺涧爬山，直至源流之处，乃是一股瀑布飞泉。
candidates.sourceText: 喊一声，都拖男挈女，呼弟呼兄，一齐跑来，顺涧爬山，直至源流之处，乃是一股瀑布飞泉。
candidates.conceptCanonical: calling out, dragging their daughters and sons, calling brothers and siblings, they ran together up the stream and climbed the mountain, reaching a place where a waterfall cascaded down from a spring.

candidates.canonicalSource: 但见那：
candidates.sourceText: 但见那：
candidates.conceptCanonical: there they saw:

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴拍手称扬道：“好水，好水！
candidates.sourceText: 众猴拍手称扬道：“好水，好水！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop applauded and praised: “nice water! nice water!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 原来此处远通山脚之下，直接大海之波。”
candidates.sourceText: 原来此处远通山脚之下，直接大海之波。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “it turns out this place extends far beneath the mountain foot, connecting straight to the sea waves.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 又道：“那一个有本事的，钻进去寻个源头出来，不伤身体者，我等即拜他为王。”
candidates.sourceText: 又道：“那一个有本事的，钻进去寻个源头出来，不伤身体者，我等即拜他为王。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: they said, “whoever is able to enter and find the source without harm, we will crown him king.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 连呼了三声，忽见丛杂中跳出一个石猴，应声高叫道：“我进去，我进去。”
candidates.sourceText: 连呼了三声，忽见丛杂中跳出一个石猴，应声高叫道：“我进去，我进去。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: after calling out three times, suddenly a stone monkey jumped out of the bushes and exclaimed, “i’ll go in! i’ll go in!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 好猴！
candidates.sourceText: 好猴！
candidates.conceptCanonical: what a monkey!

candidates.canonicalSource: 也是他：
candidates.sourceText: 也是他：
candidates.conceptCanonical: indeed, it was he:

candidates.canonicalSource: 你看他瞑目蹲身，将身一纵，径跳入瀑布泉中，忽睁睛抬头观看，那里边却无水无波，明明朗朗的一架桥梁。
candidates.sourceText: 你看他瞑目蹲身，将身一纵，径跳入瀑布泉中，忽睁睛抬头观看，那里边却无水无波，明明朗朗的一架桥梁。
candidates.conceptCanonical: you see him close his eyes and squat, then leap straight into the waterfall spring. suddenly he opens his eyes and looks upward; inside, there is no water nor waves, but a clear and bright bridge.

candidates.canonicalSource: 他住了身，定了神，仔细再看，原来是座铁板桥。
candidates.sourceText: 他住了身，定了神，仔细再看，原来是座铁板桥。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he stops, steadies himself, and peers more carefully — it is in fact an iron-plate bridge.

candidates.canonicalSource: 桥下之水，冲贯于石窍之间，倒挂流出去，遮闭了桥门。
candidates.sourceText: 桥下之水，冲贯于石窍之间，倒挂流出去，遮闭了桥门。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the water rushes beneath the stone openings, flowing upside down and blocking the bridge gate.

candidates.canonicalSource: 却又欠身上桥头，再走再看，却似有人家住处一般，真个好所在。
candidates.sourceText: 却又欠身上桥头，再走再看，却似有人家住处一般，真个好所在。
candidates.conceptCanonical: bowing at the bridge end, he proceeds, looking around, as if it were a human home — truly a good place.

candidates.canonicalSource: 看罢多时，跳过桥中间，左右观看。
candidates.sourceText: 看罢多时，跳过桥中间，左右观看。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after much observation, he jumps over the bridge’s middle and looks about left and right.

candidates.canonicalSource: 只见正当中有一石碣，碣上有一行楷书大字，镌著“花果山福地，水帘洞洞天”。
candidates.sourceText: 只见正当中有一石碣，碣上有一行楷书大字，镌著“花果山福地，水帘洞洞天”。
candidates.conceptCanonical: at the center there is a stone tablet inscribed in regular script with the large characters: “flower-fruit mountain blessed land, water curtain cave celestial grotto.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 石猿喜不自胜，急抽身往外便走，复瞑目蹲身，跳出水外，打了两个呵呵道：“大造化！
candidates.sourceText: 石猿喜不自胜，急抽身往外便走，复瞑目蹲身，跳出水外，打了两个呵呵道：“大造化！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the stone monkey was overjoyed, hastily stepping out and jumping out of the water, exclaiming twice, “great creation! great creation!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 大造化！”
candidates.sourceText: 大造化！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop surrounded him and asked, “what is it like inside? how deep is the water?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴把他围住，问道：“里面怎么样？
candidates.sourceText: 众猴把他围住，问道：“里面怎么样？
candidates.conceptCanonical: the stone monkey said, “there is no water! no water!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 水有多深？”
candidates.sourceText: 水有多深？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “it is actually an iron-plate bridge, and beyond the bridge is a home made by heaven and earth.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 石猴道：“没水！
candidates.sourceText: 石猴道：“没水！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop asked, “how can you tell it is a home?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 没水！
candidates.sourceText: 没水！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the stone monkey laughed and said, “the water is rushing beneath the stone bridge, flowing upside down and blocking the doorway.

candidates.canonicalSource: 原来是一座铁板桥，桥那边是一座天造地设的家当。”
candidates.sourceText: 原来是一座铁板桥，桥那边是一座天造地设的家当。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: around the bridge there are flowers and trees; it is a stone house.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴道：“怎见得是个家当？”
candidates.sourceText: 众猴道：“怎见得是个家当？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “inside the house are stone nests, stone stoves, stone bowls, stone basins, stone beds, and stone stools.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 石猴笑道：“这股水乃是桥下冲贯石桥，倒挂下来遮闭门户的。
candidates.sourceText: 石猴笑道：“这股水乃是桥下冲贯石桥，倒挂下来遮闭门户的。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “on a stone tablet in the middle is engraved ‘flower-fruit mountain blessed land, water curtain cave celestial grotto.’”

candidates.canonicalSource: 桥边有花有树，乃是一座石房。
candidates.sourceText: 桥边有花有树，乃是一座石房。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “it is truly a place for us to settle.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 房内有石窝、石灶、石碗、石盆、石床、石凳。
candidates.sourceText: 房内有石窝、石灶、石碗、石盆、石床、石凳。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “inside it is spacious enough to hold hundreds of old and young.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 中间一块石碣上，镌著‘花果山福地，水帘洞洞天’。
candidates.sourceText: 中间一块石碣上，镌著‘花果山福地，水帘洞洞天’。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “we shall all move in and live here, avoiding the hardships of the sky.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 真个是我们安身之处。
candidates.sourceText: 真个是我们安身之处。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “inside here:”

candidates.canonicalSource: 里面且是宽阔，容得千百口老小。
candidates.sourceText: 里面且是宽阔，容得千百口老小。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop heard this and every one rejoiced.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我们都进去住，也省得受老天之气。
candidates.sourceText: 我们都进去住，也省得受老天之气。
candidates.conceptCanonical: they said, “you go first and lead us in, come on!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 这里边：
candidates.sourceText: 这里边：
candidates.conceptCanonical: the stone monkey closed his eyes and squatted, jumping inside, calling, “all follow me in, come in!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴听得，个个欢喜。
candidates.sourceText: 众猴听得，个个欢喜。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the brave among the monkeys jumped in; the timid ones stuck out their heads, scratched their ears anxiously, shouted loudly, but eventually all entered.

candidates.canonicalSource: 都道：“你还先走，带我们进去，进去。”
candidates.sourceText: 都道：“你还先走，带我们进去，进去。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: crossing the bridge entrance, they scrambled for basins and bowls, contested for stoves and beds, moving things here and there — embodying monkey mischief, they only stopped when exhausted.

candidates.canonicalSource: 石猴却又瞑目蹲身，往里一跳，叫道：“都随我进来，进来。”
candidates.sourceText: 石猴却又瞑目蹲身，往里一跳，叫道：“都随我进来，进来。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the stone monkey sat proudly atop and said, “friends, it is said: ‘a person without trustworthiness is not to be depended on.'

candidates.canonicalSource: 那些猴有胆大的，都跳进去了；胆小的，一个个伸头缩颈，抓耳挠腮，大声叫喊，缠一会，也都进去了。
candidates.sourceText: 那些猴有胆大的，都跳进去了；胆小的，一个个伸头缩颈，抓耳挠腮，大声叫喊，缠一会，也都进去了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: you just said whoever can enter and exit unharmed shall be crowned king.

candidates.canonicalSource: 跳过桥头，一个个抢盆夺碗，占灶争床，搬过来，移过去，正是猴性顽劣，再无一个宁时，只搬得力倦神疲方止。
candidates.sourceText: 跳过桥头，一个个抢盆夺碗，占灶争床，搬过来，移过去，正是猴性顽劣，再无一个宁时，只搬得力倦神疲方止。
candidates.conceptCanonical: i have just gone in and out several times, and found this heavenly place for you all to rest peacefully and enjoy your own homes; why not crown me king?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 石猿端坐上面道：“列位呵，‘人而无信，不知其可。’
candidates.sourceText: 石猿端坐上面道：“列位呵，‘人而无信，不知其可。’
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop heard and knelt obediently, lining up to pay ritual respects, each proclaiming “long live the great king.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 你们才说有本事进得来，出得去，不伤身体者，就拜他为王。
candidates.sourceText: 你们才说有本事进得来，出得去，不伤身体者，就拜他为王。
candidates.conceptCanonical: from then on, the stone monkey ascended the throne, hiding the word “stone” from his name, and hence was called the handsome monkey king.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我如今进来又出去，出去又进来，寻了这一个洞天与列位安眠稳睡，各享成家之福，何不拜我为王？”
candidates.sourceText: 我如今进来又出去，出去又进来，寻了这一个洞天与列位安眠稳睡，各享成家之福，何不拜我为王？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: there is a poem to confirm this.

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴听说，即拱伏无违，一个个序齿排班，朝上礼拜，都称“千岁大王”。
candidates.sourceText: 众猴听说，即拱伏无违，一个个序齿排班，朝上礼拜，都称“千岁大王”。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the poem says:

candidates.canonicalSource: 自此，石猿高登王位，将“石”字儿隐了，遂称“美猴王”。
candidates.sourceText: 自此，石猿高登王位，将“石”字儿隐了，遂称“美猴王”。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king led a troop of monkeys, macaques, and rhesus monkeys, assigning roles of sovereign, ministers, assistants, and messengers.

candidates.canonicalSource: 有诗为证。
candidates.sourceText: 有诗为证。
candidates.conceptCanonical: they roamed flower-fruit mountain by day and stayed in the water curtain cave by night, united and harmonious, avoiding flocks of birds and wild beasts alike, ruling themselves happily.

candidates.canonicalSource: 诗曰：
candidates.sourceText: 诗曰：
candidates.conceptCanonical: thus:

candidates.canonicalSource: 美猴王领一群猿猴、猕猴、马猴等，分派了君臣佐使。
candidates.sourceText: 美猴王领一群猿猴、猕猴、马猴等，分派了君臣佐使。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king enjoyed heaven's innocence, anticipating three to five hundred years of happiness.

candidates.canonicalSource: 朝游花果山，暮宿水帘洞，合契同情，不入飞鸟之丛，不从走兽之类，独自为王，不胜欢乐。
candidates.sourceText: 朝游花果山，暮宿水帘洞，合契同情，不入飞鸟之丛，不从走兽之类，独自为王，不胜欢乐。
candidates.conceptCanonical: one day, amid joyous feasting with the troop, sudden worry came and tears fell.

candidates.canonicalSource: 是以：
candidates.sourceText: 是以：
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop hurriedly approached, bowing and asking, “great king, why the distress?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 美猴王享乐天真，何期有三五百载。
candidates.sourceText: 美猴王享乐天真，何期有三五百载。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, “though in joy, i bear a slight distant worry, hence my distress.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 一日，与群猴喜宴之间，忽然忧恼，堕下泪来。
candidates.sourceText: 一日，与群猴喜宴之间，忽然忧恼，堕下泪来。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop laughed and said, “king, you are truly not content.

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴慌忙罗拜道：“大王何为烦恼？”
candidates.sourceText: 众猴慌忙罗拜道：“大王何为烦恼？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: we gather every day in joyous meetings, on this immortal mountain blessed land, ancient divine land, not under the yoke of qilin nor phoenix, nor under human kingly rule, free and unrestrained, enjoying boundless blessings — why worry about distant troubles?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“我虽在欢喜之时，却有一点儿远虑，故此烦恼。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“我虽在欢喜之时，却有一点儿远虑，故此烦恼。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, "though i am in the midst of joy, i still have some distant concerns, and so i am troubled."

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴又笑道：“大王好不知足。
candidates.sourceText: 众猴又笑道：“大王好不知足。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop of monkeys laughed again and said, "king, you are truly not content."

candidates.canonicalSource: 我等日日欢会，在仙山福地，古洞神洲，不伏麒麟辖，不伏凤凰管，又不伏人间王位所拘束，自由自在，乃无量之福，为何远虑而忧也？”
candidates.sourceText: 我等日日欢会，在仙山福地，古洞神洲，不伏麒麟辖，不伏凤凰管，又不伏人间王位所拘束，自由自在，乃无量之福，为何远虑而忧也？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: "we gather daily in celebration, in the fairy mountains and blessed lands, ancient caves and divine isles. we obey neither the ruling of the qilin nor the control of the phoenix, nor are we bound by earthly kingship. we live freely and unrestrained—a boundless blessing. why then do you harbor distant worries and sorrow?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“今日虽不归人王法律，不惧禽兽威严，将来年老血衰，暗中有阎王老子管著，一旦身亡，可不枉生世界之中，不得久注天人之内？”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“今日虽不归人王法律，不惧禽兽威严，将来年老血衰，暗中有阎王老子管著，一旦身亡，可不枉生世界之中，不得久注天人之内？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, "though today we are not subject to the human king's laws, nor fear the authority of beasts, in old age, when blood weakens, under the secret governance of king yan, once life ends, would it not be a pointless existence in this world, unable to remain long among heaven and humans?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴闻此言，一个个掩面悲啼，俱以无常为虑。
candidates.sourceText: 众猴闻此言，一个个掩面悲啼，俱以无常为虑。
candidates.conceptCanonical: upon hearing this, all the monkeys covered their faces and wept mournfully, deeply troubled by the impermanence of life.

candidates.canonicalSource: 只见那班部中，忽跳出一个通背猿猴，厉声高叫道：“大王若是这般远虑，真所谓道心开发也。
candidates.sourceText: 只见那班部中，忽跳出一个通背猿猴，厉声高叫道：“大王若是这般远虑，真所谓道心开发也。
candidates.conceptCanonical: suddenly from the troop, a backward-facing ape leapt out, loudly shouting, "if the king really worries like this, it shows true awakening of the way.

candidates.canonicalSource: 如今五虫之内，惟有三等名色不伏阎王老子所管。”
candidates.sourceText: 如今五虫之内，惟有三等名色不伏阎王老子所管。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: among the five types of beings, only three kinds—those of name and form—do not submit to king yan's control."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“你知那三等人？”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“你知那三等人？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king asked, "do you know who those three kinds are?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猿猴道：“乃是佛与仙与神圣三者，躲过轮回，不生不灭，与天地山川齐寿。”
candidates.sourceText: 猿猴道：“乃是佛与仙与神圣三者，躲过轮回，不生不灭，与天地山川齐寿。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the ape replied, "they are the buddha, immortal, and the divine, who escape the cycle of reincarnation, neither born nor dying, living as long as heaven, earth, and mountains."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“此三者居于何所？”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“此三者居于何所？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king asked, "where do these three dwell?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猿猴道：“他只在阎浮世界之中，古洞仙山之内。”
candidates.sourceText: 猿猴道：“他只在阎浮世界之中，古洞仙山之内。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the ape said, "they only reside within the manifested world, inside ancient cave-and-immortal mountains."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王闻之，满心欢喜道：“我明日就辞汝等下山，云游海角，远涉天涯，务必访此三者，学一个不老长生，常躲过阎君之难。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王闻之，满心欢喜道：“我明日就辞汝等下山，云游海角，远涉天涯，务必访此三者，学一个不老长生，常躲过阎君之难。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, the monkey king's heart filled with joy, saying, "tomorrow i will bid farewell and descend the mountain to roam the edges of the sea and cross the ends of the earth, determined to find these three and learn their method of immortality, forever avoiding king yan's trials."

candidates.canonicalSource: 噫！
candidates.sourceText: 噫！
candidates.conceptCanonical: ah!

candidates.canonicalSource: 这句话，顿教跳出轮回网，致使齐天大圣成。
candidates.sourceText: 这句话，顿教跳出轮回网，致使齐天大圣成。
candidates.conceptCanonical: these words immediately broke the net of reincarnation, leading to the birth of the great sage equal to heaven.

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴鼓掌称扬，都道：“善哉，善哉！
candidates.sourceText: 众猴鼓掌称扬，都道：“善哉，善哉！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop of monkeys clapped their hands in praise, all saying, "well done, well done!

candidates.canonicalSource: 我等明日越岭登山，广寻些果品，大设筵宴送大王也。”
candidates.sourceText: 我等明日越岭登山，广寻些果品，大设筵宴送大王也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: tomorrow we shall cross the ridges and scale the mountains to gather fruits, preparing a grand feast to send off the great king."

candidates.canonicalSource: 次日，众猴果去采仙桃，摘异果，刨山药，斸黄精。
candidates.sourceText: 次日，众猴果去采仙桃，摘异果，刨山药，斸黄精。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the next day, the monkeys went to gather celestial peaches, strange fruits, dug up mountain yams, and cut yellow essence roots.

candidates.canonicalSource: 芝兰香蕙，瑶草奇花，般般件件，整整齐齐，摆开石凳石桌，排列仙酒仙肴。
candidates.sourceText: 芝兰香蕙，瑶草奇花，般般件件，整整齐齐，摆开石凳石桌，排列仙酒仙肴。
candidates.conceptCanonical: fragrant orchids, precious herbs, miraculous flowers—all sorts of items were arranged neatly on stone stools and tables, alongside immortal wine and delicacies.

candidates.canonicalSource: 群猴尊美猴王上坐，各依齿肩排于下边，一个个轮流上前奉酒、奉花、奉果，痛饮了一日。
candidates.sourceText: 群猴尊美猴王上坐，各依齿肩排于下边，一个个轮流上前奉酒、奉花、奉果，痛饮了一日。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the troop of monkeys honored the handsome monkey king by seating him above, each aligned by order of teeth and shoulders beneath; one by one they took turns presenting wine, flowers, and fruits, drinking deeply throughout the day.

candidates.canonicalSource: 次日，美猴王早起，教：“小的们，替我折些枯松，编作筏子，取个竹竿作篙，收拾些果品之类，我将去也。”
candidates.sourceText: 次日，美猴王早起，教：“小的们，替我折些枯松，编作筏子，取个竹竿作篙，收拾些果品之类，我将去也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the next morning, the handsome monkey king rose early and said, "you little ones, break some dry pine to weave a raft, take a bamboo pole as oar, and pack some fruits; i am about to depart."

candidates.canonicalSource: 果独自登筏，尽力撑开，飘飘荡荡，径向大海波中，趁天风，来渡南赡部洲地界。
candidates.sourceText: 果独自登筏，尽力撑开，飘飘荡荡，径向大海波中，趁天风，来渡南赡部洲地界。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he indeed boarded the raft alone, paddled with all his might, drifting and swaying straight into the great sea waves, using the sky wind to cross into the southern zanbu continent's domain.

candidates.canonicalSource: 这一去，正是那：
candidates.sourceText: 这一去，正是那：
candidates.conceptCanonical: this departure was just like the:

candidates.canonicalSource: 也是他运至时来，自登木筏之后，连日东南风紧，将他送到西北岸前，乃是南赡部洲地界。
candidates.sourceText: 也是他运至时来，自登木筏之后，连日东南风紧，将他送到西北岸前，乃是南赡部洲地界。
candidates.conceptCanonical: and it was at the time the persistent southeast wind came; after launching the wooden raft, the wind carried him continuously to the northwest shore, which was the southern zanbu continent.

candidates.canonicalSource: 持篙试水，偶得浅水，弃了筏子，跳上岸来。
candidates.sourceText: 持篙试水，偶得浅水，弃了筏子，跳上岸来。
candidates.conceptCanonical: testing the water with the pole, he found shallow water, abandoned the raft, and jumped ashore.

candidates.canonicalSource: 只见海边有人捕鱼、打雁、穵蛤、淘盐。
candidates.sourceText: 只见海边有人捕鱼、打雁、穵蛤、淘盐。
candidates.conceptCanonical: there on the seashore were people fishing, hunting wild geese, digging clams, and gathering salt.

candidates.canonicalSource: 他走近前，弄个把戏，妆个𡤫虎，吓得那些人丢筐弃网，四散奔跑。
candidates.sourceText: 他走近前，弄个把戏，妆个𡤫虎，吓得那些人丢筐弃网，四散奔跑。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he approached and performed a trick, made a fierce tiger costume, frightening those people into dropping baskets and nets, scattering and running away.

candidates.canonicalSource: 将那跑不动的拿住一个，剥了他的衣裳，也学人穿在身上。
candidates.sourceText: 将那跑不动的拿住一个，剥了他的衣裳，也学人穿在身上。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he captured one who could not escape, stripped his clothes, and imitated wearing them himself.

candidates.canonicalSource: 摇摇摆摆，穿州过府，在市廛中学人礼，学人话。
candidates.sourceText: 摇摇摆摆，穿州过府，在市廛中学人礼，学人话。
candidates.conceptCanonical: swaying and staggering, he wandered through towns and cities, learning manners and speech of the people.

candidates.canonicalSource: 朝餐夜宿，一心里访问佛、仙、神圣之道，觅个长生不老之方。
candidates.sourceText: 朝餐夜宿，一心里访问佛、仙、神圣之道，觅个长生不老之方。
candidates.conceptCanonical: eating morning and night, his heart constantly sought the way of buddha, immortal, and divine, searching for methods of immortality.

candidates.canonicalSource: 见世人都是为名为利之徒，更无一个为身命者。
candidates.sourceText: 见世人都是为名为利之徒，更无一个为身命者。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he saw that all worldly people pursued fame and profit, with none caring truly for their own life.

candidates.canonicalSource: 正是那：
candidates.sourceText: 正是那：
candidates.conceptCanonical: indeed:

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王参访仙道，无缘得遇。
candidates.sourceText: 猴王参访仙道，无缘得遇。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king sought the immortal way but was without success.

candidates.canonicalSource: 在于南赡部洲，串长城，游小县，不觉八九年馀。
candidates.sourceText: 在于南赡部洲，串长城，游小县，不觉八九年馀。
candidates.conceptCanonical: in the southern zanbu continent, he roamed long walls and small counties, unknowingly passing more than eight or nine years.

candidates.canonicalSource: 忽行至西洋大海，他想著海外必有神仙。
candidates.sourceText: 忽行至西洋大海，他想著海外必有神仙。
candidates.conceptCanonical: suddenly he reached the western ocean, thinking the far off seas must hold immortals.

candidates.canonicalSource: 独自个依前作筏，又飘过西海，直至西牛贺洲地界。
candidates.sourceText: 独自个依前作筏，又飘过西海，直至西牛贺洲地界。
candidates.conceptCanonical: alone again, he made a raft as before, drifting across the western seas, reaching the boundary of the western niuhes continent.

candidates.canonicalSource: 登岸遍访多时，忽见一座高山秀丽，林麓幽深。
candidates.sourceText: 登岸遍访多时，忽见一座高山秀丽，林麓幽深。
candidates.conceptCanonical: landing, after lengthy searching, he suddenly saw a tall and beautiful mountain, its slopes deeply forested.

candidates.canonicalSource: 他也不怕狼虫，不惧虎豹，登在山顶上观看。
candidates.sourceText: 他也不怕狼虫，不惧虎豹，登在山顶上观看。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he was unafraid of wolves or insects, nor of tigers or leopards, and climbed atop the mountain to observe.

candidates.canonicalSource: 果是好山：
candidates.sourceText: 果是好山：
candidates.conceptCanonical: indeed it was a fine mountain:

candidates.canonicalSource: 正观看间，忽闻得林深之处有人言语。
candidates.sourceText: 正观看间，忽闻得林深之处有人言语。
candidates.conceptCanonical: while watching, he suddenly heard voices coming from deep within the forest.

candidates.canonicalSource: 急忙趋步，穿入林中，侧耳而听，原来是歌唱之声。
candidates.sourceText: 急忙趋步，穿入林中，侧耳而听，原来是歌唱之声。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he hurried forward, entering the woods, and listened carefully; it was singing.

candidates.canonicalSource: 歌曰：
candidates.sourceText: 歌曰：
candidates.conceptCanonical: the song said:

candidates.canonicalSource: 美猴王听得此言，满心欢喜道：“神仙原来藏在这里！”
candidates.sourceText: 美猴王听得此言，满心欢喜道：“神仙原来藏在这里！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king heard these words and rejoiced, saying, "immortals indeed hide here!"

candidates.canonicalSource: 即忙跳入里面，仔细再看，乃是一个樵子，在那里举斧砍柴。
candidates.sourceText: 即忙跳入里面，仔细再看，乃是一个樵子，在那里举斧砍柴。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he promptly leapt inside and looked carefully, finding a woodcutter there, raising an axe to chop firewood.

candidates.canonicalSource: 但看他打扮非常：
candidates.sourceText: 但看他打扮非常：
candidates.conceptCanonical: but his appearance was unusual:

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王近前叫道：“老神仙，弟子起手。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王近前叫道：“老神仙，弟子起手。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king stepped forward calling, "old immortal, i am a disciple seeking the way."

candidates.canonicalSource: 那樵汉慌忙丢了斧，转身答礼道：“不当人，不当人。
candidates.sourceText: 那樵汉慌忙丢了斧，转身答礼道：“不当人，不当人。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the woodcutter hurriedly dropped his axe and turned to greet, saying, "i am no man, no man.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我拙汉衣食不全，怎敢当‘神仙’二字？”
candidates.sourceText: 我拙汉衣食不全，怎敢当‘神仙’二字？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: with my humble clothes and food, how dare i claim the title 'immortal'?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“你不是神仙，如何说出神仙的话来？”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“你不是神仙，如何说出神仙的话来？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, "if you are not an immortal, how can you speak immortal words?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 樵夫道：“我说甚么神仙话？”
candidates.sourceText: 樵夫道：“我说甚么神仙话？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the woodcutter asked, "what immortal words did i say?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“我才来至林边，只听的你说：‘相逢处，非仙即道，静坐讲《黄庭》。’
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“我才来至林边，只听的你说：‘相逢处，非仙即道，静坐讲《黄庭》。’
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king replied, "i just came to the edge of the forest and heard you say: 'where we meet, is either immortal or way, sitting quietly discussing huangting.'

candidates.canonicalSource: 《黄庭》乃道德真言，非神仙而何？”
candidates.sourceText: 《黄庭》乃道德真言，非神仙而何？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the huangting is the true doctrine of tao and virtue; who but an immortal would speak so?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 樵夫笑道：“实不瞒你说，这个词名做《满庭芳》，乃一神仙教我的。
candidates.sourceText: 樵夫笑道：“实不瞒你说，这个词名做《满庭芳》，乃一神仙教我的。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the woodcutter laughed and said, "to be frank, that phrase is called 'mantingfang,' taught to me by an immortal.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那神仙与我舍下相邻，他见我家事劳苦，日常烦恼，教我遇烦恼时，即把这词儿念念，一则散心，二则解困。
candidates.sourceText: 那神仙与我舍下相邻，他见我家事劳苦，日常烦恼，教我遇烦恼时，即把这词儿念念，一则散心，二则解困。
candidates.conceptCanonical: that immortal is my neighbor; seeing my family's troubles and daily worries, he taught me to recite this verse when troubled, to both disperse my mind and relieve difficulty.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我才有些不足处思虑，故此念念，不期被你听了。”
candidates.sourceText: 我才有些不足处思虑，故此念念，不期被你听了。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i just have some shortcomings in thinking, so repeat it; i did not expect you to overhear."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“你家既与神仙相邻，何不从他修行？
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“你家既与神仙相邻，何不从他修行？
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, "since your house neighbors an immortal, why not learn from him?

candidates.canonicalSource: 学得个不老之方，却不是好？”
candidates.sourceText: 学得个不老之方，却不是好？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: if you obtained the secret to immortality, would that not be good?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 樵夫道：“我一生命苦：自幼蒙父母养育至八九岁，才知人事，不幸父丧，母亲居孀。
candidates.sourceText: 樵夫道：“我一生命苦：自幼蒙父母养育至八九岁，才知人事，不幸父丧，母亲居孀。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the woodcutter said, "my life is full of hardship: from a young age my parents raised me until i was eight or nine and only then understood human affairs; sadly, my father died, and my mother was widowed.

candidates.canonicalSource: 再无兄弟姊妹，只我一人，没奈何，早晚侍奉。
candidates.sourceText: 再无兄弟姊妹，只我一人，没奈何，早晚侍奉。
candidates.conceptCanonical: i have no siblings; i alone must care for her.

candidates.canonicalSource: 如今母老，一发不敢抛离。
candidates.sourceText: 如今母老，一发不敢抛离。
candidates.conceptCanonical: now that my mother is old, i dare not leave her alone.

candidates.canonicalSource: 却又田园荒芜，衣食不足，只得斫两束柴薪，挑向市廛之间，货几文钱，籴几升米，自炊自造，安排些茶饭，供养老母。
candidates.sourceText: 却又田园荒芜，衣食不足，只得斫两束柴薪，挑向市廛之间，货几文钱，籴几升米，自炊自造，安排些茶饭，供养老母。
candidates.conceptCanonical: our fields are barren; there is not enough food or clothes. i must cut bundles of firewood and carry them to the town market to sell for a few coins to buy rice, cooking meals to support my old mother.

candidates.canonicalSource: 所以不能修行。”
candidates.sourceText: 所以不能修行。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: thus, i cannot pursue cultivation."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“据你说起来，乃是一个行孝的君子，向后必有好处。
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“据你说起来，乃是一个行孝的君子，向后必有好处。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, "by your account, you are a filial man; good will come to you in time.

candidates.canonicalSource: 但望你指与我那神仙住处，却好拜访去也。”
candidates.sourceText: 但望你指与我那神仙住处，却好拜访去也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: but please show me where this immortal lives so i may pay him a visit."

candidates.canonicalSource: 樵夫道：“不远，不远。
candidates.sourceText: 樵夫道：“不远，不远。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the woodcutter said, "not far, not far.

candidates.canonicalSource: 此山叫做灵台方寸山，山中有座斜月三星洞，那洞中有一个神仙，称名须菩提祖师。
candidates.sourceText: 此山叫做灵台方寸山，山中有座斜月三星洞，那洞中有一个神仙，称名须菩提祖师。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this mountain is called lingtai fangcun mountain; within it is the slanting moon three stars cave, where dwells an immortal called patriarch bodhi.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那祖师出去的徒弟，也不计其数，见今还有三四十人从他修行。
candidates.sourceText: 那祖师出去的徒弟，也不计其数，见今还有三四十人从他修行。
candidates.conceptCanonical: that patriarch has countless disciples, and today three or four dozen still study under him.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你顺那条小路儿，向南行七八里远近，即是他家了。”
candidates.sourceText: 你顺那条小路儿，向南行七八里远近，即是他家了。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: follow the little path south seven or eight li; there you will find his home."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王用手扯住樵夫道：“老兄，你便同我去去，若还得了好处，决不忘你指引之恩。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王用手扯住樵夫道：“老兄，你便同我去去，若还得了好处，决不忘你指引之恩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king grasped the woodcutter’s hand and said, "brother, please go with me. if any gain comes, i will never forget your guidance."

candidates.canonicalSource: 樵夫道：“你这汉子甚不通变，我方才这般与你说了，你还不省？
candidates.sourceText: 樵夫道：“你这汉子甚不通变，我方才这般与你说了，你还不省？
candidates.conceptCanonical: the woodcutter said, "you man are quite unwise. i just said all this, yet you don’t understand?

candidates.canonicalSource: 假若我与你去了，却不误了我的生意？
candidates.sourceText: 假若我与你去了，却不误了我的生意？
candidates.conceptCanonical: if i go with you, how would i attend to my business?

candidates.canonicalSource: 老母何人奉养？
candidates.sourceText: 老母何人奉养？
candidates.conceptCanonical: who will care for my old mother?

candidates.canonicalSource: 我要斫柴，你自去，自去。”
candidates.sourceText: 我要斫柴，你自去，自去。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i have to cut firewood; you go on your own."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王听说，只得相辞。
candidates.sourceText: 猴王听说，只得相辞。
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, the monkey king had no choice but to take his leave.

candidates.canonicalSource: 出深林，找上路径，过一山坡，约有七八里远，果然望见一座洞府。
candidates.sourceText: 出深林，找上路径，过一山坡，约有七八里远，果然望见一座洞府。
candidates.conceptCanonical: emerging from the deep forest, he found and followed the path, crossed a hillside about seven or eight li distant, and truly saw a cave dwelling.

candidates.canonicalSource: 挺身观看，真好去处！
candidates.sourceText: 挺身观看，真好去处！
candidates.conceptCanonical: he stood tall and observed the place—what a fine abode!

candidates.canonicalSource: 但见：
candidates.sourceText: 但见：
candidates.conceptCanonical: he saw:

candidates.canonicalSource: 又见那洞门紧闭，静悄悄杳无人迹。
candidates.sourceText: 又见那洞门紧闭，静悄悄杳无人迹。
candidates.conceptCanonical: but the cave door was tightly closed, silent and without any sign of life.

candidates.canonicalSource: 忽回头，见崖头立一石碑，约有三丈馀高，八尺馀阔，上有一行十个大字，乃是“灵台方寸山，斜月三星洞”。
candidates.sourceText: 忽回头，见崖头立一石碑，约有三丈馀高，八尺馀阔，上有一行十个大字，乃是“灵台方寸山，斜月三星洞”。
candidates.conceptCanonical: turning back, he saw atop the cliff a stone tablet about three zhang high and over eight chi wide, inscribed with ten large characters reading: "lingtai fangcun mountain, slanting moon three stars cave."

candidates.canonicalSource: 美猴王十分欢喜道：“此间人果是朴实，果有此山此洞。”
candidates.sourceText: 美猴王十分欢喜道：“此间人果是朴实，果有此山此洞。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king was greatly pleased, saying, "this place truly is simple and honest, and indeed has this mountain and cave."

candidates.canonicalSource: 看够多时，不敢敲门。
candidates.sourceText: 看够多时，不敢敲门。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after looking long enough, he dared not knock on the door.

candidates.canonicalSource: 且去跳上松枝梢头，摘松子吃了顽耍。
candidates.sourceText: 且去跳上松枝梢头，摘松子吃了顽耍。
candidates.conceptCanonical: instead, he jumped onto the pine branches overhead, ate pine seeds, and played mischievously.

candidates.canonicalSource: 少顷间，只听得呀的一声，洞门开处，里面走出一个仙童，真个丰姿英伟，像貌清奇，比寻常俗子不同。
candidates.sourceText: 少顷间，只听得呀的一声，洞门开处，里面走出一个仙童，真个丰姿英伟，像貌清奇，比寻常俗子不同。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after a short while, he suddenly heard a cry as the door opened, and out came an immortal boy, truly splendid in appearance, with a demeanor clear and unique, unlike ordinary mortals.

candidates.canonicalSource: 但见他：
candidates.sourceText: 但见他：
candidates.conceptCanonical: he was seen:

candidates.canonicalSource: 那童子出得门来，高叫道：“甚么人在此搔扰？”
candidates.sourceText: 那童子出得门来，高叫道：“甚么人在此搔扰？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the boy came out shouting, "who is disturbing this place?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王扑的跳下树来，上前躬身道：“仙童，我是个访道学仙之弟子，更不敢在此搔扰。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王扑的跳下树来，上前躬身道：“仙童，我是个访道学仙之弟子，更不敢在此搔扰。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king leapt down from the tree and respectfully bent forward, saying, "immortal boy, i am a disciple seeking the way and learning immortality; i do not dare to disturb."

candidates.canonicalSource: 仙童笑道：“你是个访道的么？”
candidates.sourceText: 仙童笑道：“你是个访道的么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the immortal boy smiled and asked, "are you really someone seeking the way?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“是。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“是。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, "yes, i am."

candidates.canonicalSource: 童子道：“我家师父正才下榻，登坛讲道，还未说出原由，就教我出来开门。
candidates.sourceText: 童子道：“我家师父正才下榻，登坛讲道，还未说出原由，就教我出来开门。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the boy said, "my master just rested, ascended the altar to preach the way but had not yet explained the reason, then told me to come out and open the door.

candidates.canonicalSource: 说：‘外面有个修行的来了，可去接待接待。’
candidates.sourceText: 说：‘外面有个修行的来了，可去接待接待。’
candidates.conceptCanonical: he said: 'a cultivator has arrived outside; please go receive him.'

candidates.canonicalSource: 想必就是你了？”
candidates.sourceText: 想必就是你了？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: surely that is you?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王笑道：“是我，是我。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王笑道：“是我，是我。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king laughed, "it is me, it is me."

candidates.canonicalSource: 童子道：“你跟我进来。”
candidates.sourceText: 童子道：“你跟我进来。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the boy said, "follow me inside."

candidates.canonicalSource: 这猴王整衣端肃，随童子径入洞天深处观看：一层层深阁琼楼，一进进珠宫贝阙，说不尽那静室幽居。
candidates.sourceText: 这猴王整衣端肃，随童子径入洞天深处观看：一层层深阁琼楼，一进进珠宫贝阙，说不尽那静室幽居。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king tidied his clothes and solemnly followed the boy deep into the wonder cave: layers of high pavilions and jade towers, an entrance to a pearl palace and shell halls, countless quiet chambers and secluded abodes he saw.

candidates.canonicalSource: 直至瑶台之下，见那菩提祖师端坐在台上，两边有三十个小仙侍立台下。
candidates.sourceText: 直至瑶台之下，见那菩提祖师端坐在台上，两边有三十个小仙侍立台下。
candidates.conceptCanonical: down beneath the jade terrace, he saw patriarch bodhi seated on the platform, with thirty little immortals standing at the base.

candidates.canonicalSource: 果然是：
candidates.sourceText: 果然是：
candidates.conceptCanonical: indeed it was:

candidates.canonicalSource: 美猴王一见，倒身下拜，磕头不计其数，口中只道：“师父，师父，我弟子志心朝礼，志心朝礼。”
candidates.sourceText: 美猴王一见，倒身下拜，磕头不计其数，口中只道：“师父，师父，我弟子志心朝礼，志心朝礼。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: upon seeing this, the handsome monkey king bowed down and kowtowed countless times, repeatedly saying, "master, master, your disciple respectfully salutes you, respectfully salutes you."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你是那方人氏？
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你是那方人氏？
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch asked, "where are you from?

candidates.canonicalSource: 且说个乡贯、姓名明白，再拜。”
candidates.sourceText: 且说个乡贯、姓名明白，再拜。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: tell me clearly your hometown and name, then bow again."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“弟子乃东胜神洲傲来国花果山水帘洞人氏。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“弟子乃东胜神洲傲来国花果山水帘洞人氏。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said, "i am from flower-fruit mountain water curtain cave in the aolai kingdom of east shengshen continent."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师喝令：“赶出去！
candidates.sourceText: 祖师喝令：“赶出去！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch shouted, "get him out!

candidates.canonicalSource: 他本是个撒诈捣虚之徒，那里修甚么道果！”
candidates.sourceText: 他本是个撒诈捣虚之徒，那里修甚么道果！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: he is really a trickster and mischief-maker; how could he practice the way?!"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王慌忙磕头不住道：“弟子是老实之言，决无虚诈。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王慌忙磕头不住道：“弟子是老实之言，决无虚诈。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king hurriedly kowtowed without cessation, saying, "i speak honestly with no deceit."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你既老实，怎么说东胜神洲？
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你既老实，怎么说东胜神洲？
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "if you are honest, why say you are from east shengshen?

candidates.canonicalSource: 那去处到我这里隔两重大海，一座南赡部洲，如何就得到此？”
candidates.sourceText: 那去处到我这里隔两重大海，一座南赡部洲，如何就得到此？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: there are two great seas between there and here, and the southern zanbu continent lies between; how could you have arrived here?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王叩头道：“弟子飘洋过海，登界游方，有十数个年头，方才访到此处。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王叩头道：“弟子飘洋过海，登界游方，有十数个年头，方才访到此处。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king kowtowed and said, "i sailed across the seas, wandering, for over ten years to come here."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“既是逐渐行来的也罢。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“既是逐渐行来的也罢。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "since you came gradually, so be it.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你姓甚么？”
candidates.sourceText: 你姓甚么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: what is your surname?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王又道：“我无性。
candidates.sourceText: 猴王又道：“我无性。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkey king said again, "i have no surname."

candidates.canonicalSource: 人若骂我，我也不恼；若打我，我也不嗔。
candidates.sourceText: 人若骂我，我也不恼；若打我，我也不嗔。
candidates.conceptCanonical: if someone curses me, i am not angry; if someone hits me, i do not resent.

candidates.canonicalSource: 只是陪个礼儿就罢了。
candidates.sourceText: 只是陪个礼儿就罢了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: i only return the courtesy.

candidates.canonicalSource: 一生无性。”
candidates.sourceText: 一生无性。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i have no surname in my whole life.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“不是这个性。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“不是这个性。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "it is not that kind of 'surname.'

candidates.canonicalSource: 你父母原来姓甚么？”
candidates.sourceText: 你父母原来姓甚么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: what did your parents’ surname happen to be originally?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“我也无父母。”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“我也无父母。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king said, "i have no parents."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“既无父母，想是树上生的？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“既无父母，想是树上生的？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "if you have no parents, i guess you were born from a tree?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“我虽不是树上生，却是石里长的。
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“我虽不是树上生，却是石里长的。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king replied, "though i was not born on a tree, i grew out of a stone.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我只记得花果山上有一块仙石，其年石破，我便生也。”
candidates.sourceText: 我只记得花果山上有一块仙石，其年石破，我便生也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i only remember on flower-fruit mountain there was a sacred stone. when the stone cracked open, i was born."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师闻言暗喜，道：“这等说，却是个天地生成的。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师闻言暗喜，道：“这等说，却是个天地生成的。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch heard this and was secretly pleased, saying, "if so, you are truly a creation of heaven and earth.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你起来走走我看。”
candidates.sourceText: 你起来走走我看。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: stand up and walk for me to see."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王纵身跳起，拐呀拐的走了两遍。
candidates.sourceText: 猴王纵身跳起，拐呀拐的走了两遍。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king leapt up and walked back and forth twice, twisting and turning.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师笑道：“你身躯虽是鄙陋，却像个食松果的猢狲。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师笑道：“你身躯虽是鄙陋，却像个食松果的猢狲。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch laughed, saying, "though your body is simple, you look like a macaque that eats pine cones.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我与你就身上取个姓氏，意思教你姓‘猢’。
candidates.sourceText: 我与你就身上取个姓氏，意思教你姓‘猢’。
candidates.conceptCanonical: i will give you a surname taken from your body; i mean to give you the surname 'hú' (猢).

candidates.canonicalSource: 猢字去了个兽傍，乃是个古月。
candidates.sourceText: 猢字去了个兽傍，乃是个古月。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the character 'hú' has removed the beast radical and left the ancient moon radical.

candidates.canonicalSource: 古者，老也；月者，阴也。
candidates.sourceText: 古者，老也；月者，阴也。
candidates.conceptCanonical: ancient means old; moon means yin.

candidates.canonicalSource: 老阴不能化育，教你姓‘狲’倒好。
candidates.sourceText: 老阴不能化育，教你姓‘狲’倒好。
candidates.conceptCanonical: old yin cannot nurture life; giving you the surname 'sūn' (狲) would be better.

candidates.canonicalSource: 狲字去了兽傍，乃是个子系。
candidates.sourceText: 狲字去了兽傍，乃是个子系。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the character 'sūn' removes the beast radical and becomes a character with the 'child' component.

candidates.canonicalSource: 子者，儿男也；系者。
candidates.sourceText: 子者，儿男也；系者。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the 'child' means son; the component indicates infancy.

candidates.canonicalSource: 婴细也，正合婴儿之本论。
candidates.sourceText: 婴细也，正合婴儿之本论。
candidates.conceptCanonical: delicate and young, it perfectly matches the theory of infancy.

candidates.canonicalSource: 教你姓‘孙’罢。”
candidates.sourceText: 教你姓‘孙’罢。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: so i will teach you the surname 'sun' (孙)."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王听说，满心欢喜，朝上叩头道：“好！
candidates.sourceText: 猴王听说，满心欢喜，朝上叩头道：“好！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king heard this and was filled with joy. he kowtowed to the top and said, "good!

candidates.canonicalSource: 好！
candidates.sourceText: 好！
candidates.conceptCanonical: good!

candidates.canonicalSource: 今日方知姓也。
candidates.sourceText: 今日方知姓也。
candidates.conceptCanonical: today i finally know my surname.

candidates.canonicalSource: 万望师父慈悲，既然有姓，再乞赐个名字，却好呼唤。”
candidates.sourceText: 万望师父慈悲，既然有姓，再乞赐个名字，却好呼唤。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i earnestly hope my master will be merciful; since i have a surname, please grant me a name so i may be called properly."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“我门中有十二个字，分派起名，到你乃第十辈之小徒矣。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“我门中有十二个字，分派起名，到你乃第十辈之小徒矣。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "in our sect there are twelve characters used for naming. you are the tenth generation apprentice."

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王道：“那十二个字？”
candidates.sourceText: 猴王道：“那十二个字？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king asked, "what are the twelve characters?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“乃广、大、智、慧、真、如、性、海、颖、悟、圆、觉十二字。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“乃广、大、智、慧、真、如、性、海、颖、悟、圆、觉十二字。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "they are guǎng (广), dà (大), zhì (智), huì (慧), zhēn (真), rú (如), xìng (性), hǎi (海), yǐng (颖), wù (悟), yuán (圆), jué (觉).

candidates.canonicalSource: 排到你，正当‘悟’字。
candidates.sourceText: 排到你，正当‘悟’字。
candidates.conceptCanonical: you fall under the character 'wù' (悟).

candidates.canonicalSource: 与你起个法名叫做‘孙悟空’，好么？”
candidates.sourceText: 与你起个法名叫做‘孙悟空’，好么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i will give you the dharma name 'sun wukong.' is that agreeable?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 猴王笑道：“好！
candidates.sourceText: 猴王笑道：“好！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king laughed and said, "good!

candidates.canonicalSource: 自今就叫做孙悟空也。”
candidates.sourceText: 自今就叫做孙悟空也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: from now on, i shall be called sun wukong."

candidates.canonicalSource: 正是：
candidates.sourceText: 正是：
candidates.conceptCanonical: truly:

candidates.canonicalSource: 话表美猴王得了姓名，怡然踊跃，对菩提前作礼启谢。
candidates.sourceText: 话表美猴王得了姓名，怡然踊跃，对菩提前作礼启谢。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king happily received his name and respectfully saluted patriarch bodhi to thank him in advance.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那祖师即命大众引孙悟空出二门外，教他洒扫应对、进退周旋之节。
candidates.sourceText: 那祖师即命大众引孙悟空出二门外，教他洒扫应对、进退周旋之节。
candidates.conceptCanonical: then the patriarch commanded everyone to lead sun wukong outside the second gate to teach him etiquette for cleaning, responding appropriately, advancing, retreating, and maneuvering.

candidates.canonicalSource: 众仙奉行而出。
candidates.sourceText: 众仙奉行而出。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the immortal attendants obeyed and went out.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空到门外，又拜了大众师兄，就于廊庑之间安排寝处。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空到门外，又拜了大众师兄，就于廊庑之间安排寝处。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong arrived outside, kowtowed again to elder fellow disciples, and arranged his sleeping place between the corridors.

candidates.canonicalSource: 次早，与众师兄学言语礼貌、讲经论道、习字焚香。
candidates.sourceText: 次早，与众师兄学言语礼貌、讲经论道、习字焚香。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the next morning, he studied language, etiquette, scripture discussion, calligraphy, and incense burning with the brother disciples.

candidates.canonicalSource: 每日如此。
candidates.sourceText: 每日如此。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he did this daily.

candidates.canonicalSource: 闲时即扫地锄园、养花修树、寻柴燃火、挑水运浆。
candidates.sourceText: 闲时即扫地锄园、养花修树、寻柴燃火、挑水运浆。
candidates.conceptCanonical: in free time, he swept the ground, weeded the garden, tended flowers and trees, gathered firewood, made fires, carried water and juice.

candidates.canonicalSource: 凡所用之物，无一不备。
candidates.sourceText: 凡所用之物，无一不备。
candidates.conceptCanonical: everything used was fully prepared.

candidates.canonicalSource: 在洞中不觉倏六七年。
candidates.sourceText: 在洞中不觉倏六七年。
candidates.conceptCanonical: unnoticed, six or seven years passed in the cave.

candidates.canonicalSource: 一日，祖师登坛高坐，唤集诸仙，开讲大道。
candidates.sourceText: 一日，祖师登坛高坐，唤集诸仙，开讲大道。
candidates.conceptCanonical: one day, the patriarch ascended the altar to sit high and summoned the immortals to discuss the great way.

candidates.canonicalSource: 真个是：
candidates.sourceText: 真个是：
candidates.conceptCanonical: truly it was:

candidates.canonicalSource: 孙悟空在傍闻讲，喜得他抓耳挠腮，眉花眼笑，忍不住手之舞之，足之蹈之。
candidates.sourceText: 孙悟空在傍闻讲，喜得他抓耳挠腮，眉花眼笑，忍不住手之舞之，足之蹈之。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong listened beside the hall, joyfully scratching his ears and face, smiling with sparkling eyes, unable to contain himself, waving his hands and stamping his feet.

candidates.canonicalSource: 忽被祖师看见，叫孙悟空道：“你在班中，怎么颠狂跃舞，不听我讲？”
candidates.sourceText: 忽被祖师看见，叫孙悟空道：“你在班中，怎么颠狂跃舞，不听我讲？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: suddenly, the patriarch noticed and called to wukong, "why are you frolicking and dancing in the class instead of listening to me?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“弟子诚心听讲，听到老师父妙音处，喜不自胜，故不觉作此踊跃之状。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“弟子诚心听讲，听到老师父妙音处，喜不自胜，故不觉作此踊跃之状。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "disciple sincerely listens. when i heard master’s wonderful words, i was overwhelmed with joy, so i could not help but express it this way.

candidates.canonicalSource: 望师父恕罪。”
candidates.sourceText: 望师父恕罪。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: please forgive me, master."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你既识妙音，我且问你，你到洞中多少时了？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你既识妙音，我且问你，你到洞中多少时了？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "since you understand the wonderful sounds, i shall ask: how long have you been in the cave?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“弟子本来懵懂，不知多少时节。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“弟子本来懵懂，不知多少时节。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "i was originally ignorant and did not know the passage of time.

candidates.canonicalSource: 只记得灶下无火，常去山后打柴，见一山好桃树，我在那里吃了七次饱桃矣。”
candidates.sourceText: 只记得灶下无火，常去山后打柴，见一山好桃树，我在那里吃了七次饱桃矣。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i only remember that under the stove there was no fire, and i often went behind the mountain to gather firewood. there i saw a mountain with good peach trees, where i ate my fill of peaches seven times."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“那山唤名烂桃山。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“那山唤名烂桃山。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "that mountain is called rotten peach mountain.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你既吃七次，想是七年了。
candidates.sourceText: 你既吃七次，想是七年了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: since you ate seven times, it must have been seven years.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你今要从我学些甚么道？”
candidates.sourceText: 你今要从我学些甚么道？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: now, what dao do you want to learn from me?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“但凭尊师教诲，只是有些道气儿，弟子便就学了。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“但凭尊师教诲，只是有些道气儿，弟子便就学了。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "i follow my master’s teaching wholeheartedly; as long as there is some dao energy, i will learn."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“‘道’字门中有三百六十傍门，傍门皆有正果。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“‘道’字门中有三百六十傍门，傍门皆有正果。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "the dao character gate has 360 branches, each with its proper fruit.

candidates.canonicalSource: 不知你学那一门哩？”
candidates.sourceText: 不知你学那一门哩？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: i wonder which branch you want to study?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“凭尊师意思，弟子倾心听从。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“凭尊师意思，弟子倾心听从。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "whatever master decides, i will listen with my heart."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“我教你个‘术’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“我教你个‘术’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "how about i teach you the 'art' (术) branch of dao?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“术门之道怎么说？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“术门之道怎么说？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong asked, "what does the art branch teach?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“术字门中，乃是些请仙、扶鸾、问卜、揲蓍，能知趋吉避凶之理。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“术字门中，乃是些请仙、扶鸾、问卜、揲蓍，能知趋吉避凶之理。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "the art branch teaches summoning immortals, spirit mediumship, divination, yarrow stalk casting, understanding how to seek good fortune and avoid misfortune."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“不能，不能。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“不能，不能。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "no, no."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“不学，不学。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“不学，不学。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "won't learn, won't learn."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师又道：“教你‘流’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师又道：“教你‘流’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "how about i teach you the 'flowing' (流) branch?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空又问：“流字门中是甚义理？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空又问：“流字门中是甚义理？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong asked, "what is the principle of the flowing branch?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“流字门中，乃是儒家、释家、道家、阴阳家、墨家、医家，或看经，或念佛，并朝真降圣之类。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“流字门中，乃是儒家、释家、道家、阴阳家、墨家、医家，或看经，或念佛，并朝真降圣之类。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "the flowing branch includes confucianism, buddhism, taoism, yin-yang philosophy, mohism, medicine; reading scriptures, chanting buddha's name, and venerating true sages and saints."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“若要长生，也似壁里安柱。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“若要长生，也似壁里安柱。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "if you want immortality, it is like placing a pillar within a wall."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“师父，我是个老实人，不晓得打市语。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“师父，我是个老实人，不晓得打市语。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "master, i’m simple and do not understand worldly talk.

candidates.canonicalSource: 怎么谓之‘壁里安柱’？”
candidates.sourceText: 怎么谓之‘壁里安柱’？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: what does 'placing a pillar within a wall' mean?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“人家盖房，欲图坚固，将墙壁之间立一顶柱，有日大厦将颓，他必朽矣。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“人家盖房，欲图坚固，将墙壁之间立一顶柱，有日大厦将颓，他必朽矣。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "when building a house, to make it strong, they set a pillar inside the walls. when the mansion is about to collapse, it must inevitably rot away."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“据此说，也不长久。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“据此说，也不长久。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "by that logic, it isn’t lasting.

candidates.canonicalSource: 不学，不学。”
candidates.sourceText: 不学，不学。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: won't learn, won't learn."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“教你‘静’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“教你‘静’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "how about i teach you the 'stillness' (静) branch?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“静字门中是甚正果？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“静字门中是甚正果？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong asked, "what is the fruit of the stillness branch?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“此是休粮守谷、清静无为、参禅打坐、戒语持斋，或睡功，或立功，并入定、坐关之类。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“此是休粮守谷、清静无为、参禅打坐、戒语持斋，或睡功，或立功，并入定、坐关之类。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "it includes preserving essence and grain, tranquility and non-action, meditation and seated contemplation, chanting vows and dietary discipline, as well as sleep cultivation, standing meditation, and entering samadhi."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“这般也能长生么？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“这般也能长生么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "can that also bring immortality?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“也似窑头土坯。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“也似窑头土坯。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "that is like unbaked adobe bricks on a kiln.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空笑道：“师父果有些滴㳠。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空笑道：“师父果有些滴㳠。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong laughed, "master, you do speak clearly.

candidates.canonicalSource: 一行说我不会打市语。
candidates.sourceText: 一行说我不会打市语。
candidates.conceptCanonical: you say i cannot understand worldly talk.

candidates.canonicalSource: 怎么谓之‘窑头土坯’？”
candidates.sourceText: 怎么谓之‘窑头土坯’？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: what does 'unbaked adobe bricks on a kiln' mean?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“就如那窑头上造成砖瓦之坯，虽已成形，尚未经水火锻炼，一朝大雨滂沱，他必滥矣。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“就如那窑头上造成砖瓦之坯，虽已成形，尚未经水火锻炼，一朝大雨滂沱，他必滥矣。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "like the bricks and tiles made on the kiln head, though formed, not yet tempered by water and fire, when heavy rain arrives they will certainly crumble."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“也不长远。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“也不长远。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "that won’t last long either.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“教你‘动’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“教你‘动’字门中之道，如何？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "how about i teach you the 'movement' (动) branch?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“动门之道却又怎么？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“动门之道却又怎么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "what does the movement branch teach?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“此是有为有作：采阴补阳、攀弓踏弩、摩脐过气、用方炮制、烧茅打鼎、进红铅、炼秋石，并服妇乳之类。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“此是有为有作：采阴补阳、攀弓踏弩、摩脐过气、用方炮制、烧茅打鼎、进红铅、炼秋石，并服妇乳之类。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "it involves practices to augment yin and yang: drawing the bow, treading the crossbow; rubbing the navel to circulate energy; the use of formulas and medicines; burning herbs and heating cauldrons; ingesting cinnabar; refining autumn stones; and consuming women’s milk."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“似这等也得长生么？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“似这等也得长生么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "does this path grant immortality?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“此欲长生，亦如水中捞月。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“此欲长生，亦如水中捞月。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "seeking immortality this way is like fishing for the moon in the water."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“师父又来了。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“师父又来了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "master mocks me again.

candidates.canonicalSource: 怎么叫做‘水中捞月’？”
candidates.sourceText: 怎么叫做‘水中捞月’？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: what is meant by 'fishing for the moon in the water'?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“月在长空，水中有影，虽然看见，只是无捞摸处，到底只成空耳。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“月在长空，水中有影，虽然看见，只是无捞摸处，到底只成空耳。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, "the moon is in the high sky; its reflection is in the water. though seen, there is nothing to grasp; ultimately it is only emptiness."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“也不学，不学。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“也不学，不学。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "won't learn, won't learn."

candidates.canonicalSource: 走上前，将悟空头上打了三下。
candidates.sourceText: 走上前，将悟空头上打了三下。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he stepped forward and struck wukong three times on the head.

candidates.canonicalSource: 倒背著手，走入里面，将中门关了，撇下大众而去。
candidates.sourceText: 倒背著手，走入里面，将中门关了，撇下大众而去。
candidates.conceptCanonical: then he turned his back, walked inside, closed the middle door, and left the crowd behind.

candidates.canonicalSource: 諕得那一班听讲的人人惊惧，皆怨悟空道：“你这泼猴，十分无状。
candidates.sourceText: 諕得那一班听讲的人人惊惧，皆怨悟空道：“你这泼猴，十分无状。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the group listening was terrified and complained to wukong: "you unbridled monkey, so disrespectful.

candidates.canonicalSource: 师父传你道法，如何不学，却与师父顶嘴？
candidates.sourceText: 师父传你道法，如何不学，却与师父顶嘴？
candidates.conceptCanonical: the master teaches you dao, how can you refuse and talk back?

candidates.canonicalSource: 这番冲撞了他，不知几时才出来呵！”
candidates.sourceText: 这番冲撞了他，不知几时才出来呵！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: if you anger him more, who knows when you'll come out!"

candidates.canonicalSource: 此时俱甚报怨他，又鄙贱嫌恶他。
candidates.sourceText: 此时俱甚报怨他，又鄙贱嫌恶他。
candidates.conceptCanonical: at this moment, they all spoke resentfully and despised him.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空一些儿也不恼，只是满脸陪笑。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空一些儿也不恼，只是满脸陪笑。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong was not annoyed at all, only wore a face full of forced smiles.

candidates.canonicalSource: 原来那猴王已打破盘中之谜，暗暗在心，所以不与众人争竞，只是忍耐无言。
candidates.sourceText: 原来那猴王已打破盘中之谜，暗暗在心，所以不与众人争竞，只是忍耐无言。
candidates.conceptCanonical: actually, the handsome monkey king had already solved the mystery the patriarch posed; secretly in his heart, so he did not compete or argue but patiently endured in silence.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师打他三下者，教他三更时分存心；倒背著手走入里面，将中门关上者，教他从后门进步，秘处传他道也。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师打他三下者，教他三更时分存心；倒背著手走入里面，将中门关上者，教他从后门进步，秘处传他道也。
candidates.conceptCanonical: master hitting him three times was to teach him to be mindful at midnight; turning back and closing the middle door was to teach him to enter through the back door to secretly receive instruction.

candidates.canonicalSource: 当日悟空与众等喜喜欢欢，在三星仙洞之前，盼望天色，急不能到晚。
candidates.sourceText: 当日悟空与众等喜喜欢欢，在三星仙洞之前，盼望天色，急不能到晚。
candidates.conceptCanonical: that day, wukong and the others happily awaited the evening at the entrance of the three stars immortal cave, eager for night to fall.

candidates.canonicalSource: 及黄昏时，却与众就寝，假合眼，定息存神。
candidates.sourceText: 及黄昏时，却与众就寝，假合眼，定息存神。
candidates.conceptCanonical: at dusk, they went to rest, feigning sleep to calm themselves and quiet their spirits.

candidates.canonicalSource: 山中又没打更传箭，不知时分，只自家将鼻孔中出入之气调定。
candidates.sourceText: 山中又没打更传箭，不知时分，只自家将鼻孔中出入之气调定。
candidates.conceptCanonical: without any night-watchmen or signal arrows in the mountain, wukong quietly regulated the breath entering and exiting his nostrils.

candidates.canonicalSource: 约到子时前后，轻轻的起来，穿了衣服，偷开前门，躲离大众，走出外，抬头观看，正是那：
candidates.sourceText: 约到子时前后，轻轻的起来，穿了衣服，偷开前门，躲离大众，走出外，抬头观看，正是那：
candidates.conceptCanonical: just before midnight, he lightly arose, dressed, stealthily opened the front door, slipped away from the crowd, and went outside to look up at the sky.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你看他从旧路径至后门外，只见那门儿半开半掩。
candidates.sourceText: 你看他从旧路径至后门外，只见那门儿半开半掩。
candidates.conceptCanonical: look, he walks from the usual path to outside the back door, where he finds it half open, half closed.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空喜道：“老师父果然注意与我传道，故此开著门也。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空喜道：“老师父果然注意与我传道，故此开著门也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong happily said, "my master is indeed watching, so he left the door open."

candidates.canonicalSource: 即曳步近前，侧身进得门里，只走到祖师寝榻之下。
candidates.sourceText: 即曳步近前，侧身进得门里，只走到祖师寝榻之下。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he then stepped forward, entered sideways, and came to the patriarch's bed.

candidates.canonicalSource: 见祖师踡跼身躯，朝里睡著了。
candidates.sourceText: 见祖师踡跼身躯，朝里睡著了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he saw the patriarch curled up asleep inside.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空不敢惊动，即跪在榻前。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空不敢惊动，即跪在榻前。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong dared not disturb him and knelt before the bed.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那祖师不多时觉来，舒开两足，口中自吟道：
candidates.sourceText: 那祖师不多时觉来，舒开两足，口中自吟道：
candidates.conceptCanonical: after a short while, the patriarch awakened, stretched his legs, and murmured:

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空应声叫道：“师父，弟子在此跪候多时。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空应声叫道：“师父，弟子在此跪候多时。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong immediately said, "master, disciple has knelt here waiting a long time."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师闻得声音是悟空，即起披衣，盘坐喝道：“这猢狲，你不在前边去睡，却来我这后边作甚？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师闻得声音是悟空，即起披衣，盘坐喝道：“这猢狲，你不在前边去睡，却来我这后边作甚？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch, hearing wukong’s voice, rose, put on his robe, sat cross-legged, and scolded, "you monkey, why are you not sleeping among the others in front but coming here behind me?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“师父昨日坛前对众相允，教弟子三更时候，从后门里传我道理，故此大胆径拜老爷榻下。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“师父昨日坛前对众相允，教弟子三更时候，从后门里传我道理，故此大胆径拜老爷榻下。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "master, yesterday before the altar you promised the crowd to teach me dao at midnight through the back door. i boldly came straight to bow beneath your bed."

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师听说，十分欢喜，暗自寻思道：“这厮果然是个天地生成的，不然，何就打破我盘中之暗谜也？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师听说，十分欢喜，暗自寻思道：“这厮果然是个天地生成的，不然，何就打破我盘中之暗谜也？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch was very pleased, thinking to himself, "this fellow really is a being born of heaven and earth; otherwise, how could he have figured out my riddle?"

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“此间更无六耳，止只弟子一人，望师父大舍慈悲，传与我长生之道罢，永不忘恩。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“此间更无六耳，止只弟子一人，望师父大舍慈悲，传与我长生之道罢，永不忘恩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “there are no six-eared macaques here; i am the only disciple. i beseech master’s great kindness to teach me the way of immortality, and i will never forget your grace.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你今有缘，我亦喜说。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你今有缘，我亦喜说。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “since you have the fate, i am pleased to explain.

candidates.canonicalSource: 既识得盘中暗谜，你近前来，仔细听之，当传与你长生之妙道也。”
candidates.sourceText: 既识得盘中暗谜，你近前来，仔细听之，当传与你长生之妙道也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: now that you understand the hidden riddle in the disk, come closer and listen carefully; i will teach you the wondrous way to immortality.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空叩头谢了，洗耳用心，跪于榻下。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空叩头谢了，洗耳用心，跪于榻下。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong kowtowed in thanks, washed his ears and focused his mind, then knelt beneath the bed.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师云：
candidates.sourceText: 祖师云：
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said:

candidates.canonicalSource: 对祖师拜谢深恩，即出后门观看。
candidates.sourceText: 对祖师拜谢深恩，即出后门观看。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he paid deep thanks to the patriarch, then exited through the back door to observe.

candidates.canonicalSource: 但见东方天色微舒白，西路金光大显明。
candidates.sourceText: 但见东方天色微舒白，西路金光大显明。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he saw the eastern sky gently lightening to white, while the western sky shone brilliantly with golden light.

candidates.canonicalSource: 依旧路，转到前门，轻轻的推开进去，坐在原寝之处，故将床铺摇响道：“天光了，天光了，起耶！”
candidates.sourceText: 依旧路，转到前门，轻轻的推开进去，坐在原寝之处，故将床铺摇响道：“天光了，天光了，起耶！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: following the same path, he turned to the front door, pushed it open quietly, entered, and sat at his original resting place. shaking the bed, he called out, “daylight is here, daylight is here, time to rise!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 那大众还正睡哩，不知悟空已得了好事。
candidates.sourceText: 那大众还正睡哩，不知悟空已得了好事。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the others were still asleep, unaware that wukong had already obtained such good fortune.

candidates.canonicalSource: 当日起来打混，暗暗维持，子前午后，自己调息。
candidates.sourceText: 当日起来打混，暗暗维持，子前午后，自己调息。
candidates.conceptCanonical: that day he arose lazily, secretly maintained himself, and throughout the morning and afternoon, he controlled his breath.

candidates.canonicalSource: 却早过了三年，祖师复登宝座，与众说法。
candidates.sourceText: 却早过了三年，祖师复登宝座，与众说法。
candidates.conceptCanonical: already three years had passed when the patriarch again took his seat to deliver teachings to the crowd.

candidates.canonicalSource: 谈的是公案比语，论的是外像包皮。
candidates.sourceText: 谈的是公案比语，论的是外像包皮。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he spoke of public cases and comparisons, discussing external forms and coverings.

candidates.canonicalSource: 忽问：“悟空何在？”
candidates.sourceText: 忽问：“悟空何在？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: suddenly he asked, “where is wukong?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空近前跪下：“弟子有。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空近前跪下：“弟子有。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong stepped forward and knelt: “your disciple is here.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你这一向修些甚么道来？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你这一向修些甚么道来？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “what kind of path have you cultivated lately?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“弟子近来法性颇通，根源亦渐坚固矣。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“弟子近来法性颇通，根源亦渐坚固矣。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong replied, “recently, i have somewhat understood the dharma-nature, and my roots have gradually grown firm.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你既通法性，会得根源，已注神体，却只是防备著三灾利害。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你既通法性，会得根源，已注神体，却只是防备著三灾利害。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “since you understand the dharma-nature and grasp the root source, having infused your spiritual body, you must guard against the three calamities and harms.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空听说，沉吟良久道：“师父之言谬矣。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空听说，沉吟良久道：“师父之言谬矣。
candidates.conceptCanonical: upon hearing this, wukong pondered deeply and said, “master’s words are mistaken.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我尝闻道高德隆，与天同寿；水火既济，百病不生。
candidates.sourceText: 我尝闻道高德隆，与天同寿；水火既济，百病不生。
candidates.conceptCanonical: i have heard that those of high tao and great virtue share longevity with heaven; water and fire are balanced, and all diseases are absent.

candidates.canonicalSource: 却怎么有个‘三灾利害’？”
candidates.sourceText: 却怎么有个‘三灾利害’？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: so what are these ‘three calamities and harms’?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“此乃非常之道：夺天地之造化，侵日月之玄机；丹成之后，鬼神难容。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“此乃非常之道：夺天地之造化，侵日月之玄机；丹成之后，鬼神难容。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “this is an extraordinary principle: seizing heaven and earth’s natural transformation, invading the mysteries of sun and moon; after the elixir is formed, gods and spirits cannot tolerate it.

candidates.canonicalSource: 虽驻颜益寿，但到了五百年后，天降雷灾打你，须要见性明心，预先躲避。
candidates.sourceText: 虽驻颜益寿，但到了五百年后，天降雷灾打你，须要见性明心，预先躲避。
candidates.conceptCanonical: although youth and life are prolonged, after five hundred years, a heavenly thunderstorm will strike you. you must understand your nature and illuminate your mind beforehand to avoid it.

candidates.canonicalSource: 躲得过，寿与天齐；躲不过，就此绝命。
candidates.sourceText: 躲得过，寿与天齐；躲不过，就此绝命。
candidates.conceptCanonical: if you avoid it, your life will be as long as heaven; if not, your lifespan ends here.

candidates.canonicalSource: 再五百年后，天降火灾烧你。
