candidates.sourceText: 再五百年后，天降火灾烧你。
candidates.conceptCanonical: another five hundred years later, a heavenly fire disaster will descend to burn you.

candidates.canonicalSource: 这火不是天火，亦不是凡火，唤做‘阴火’。
candidates.sourceText: 这火不是天火，亦不是凡火，唤做‘阴火’。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this fire is neither celestial fire nor mortal fire, but called "yin fire."

candidates.canonicalSource: 自本身涌泉穴下烧起，直透泥垣宫，五脏成灰，四肢皆朽，把千年苦行，俱为虚幻。
candidates.sourceText: 自本身涌泉穴下烧起，直透泥垣宫，五脏成灰，四肢皆朽，把千年苦行，俱为虚幻。
candidates.conceptCanonical: it ignites under the yongquan acupoint within your body, piercing through the palace walls of your mud enclosure, turning your five organs to ash and rotting your limbs, making thousands of hardships in cultivation vanish into illusion.

candidates.canonicalSource: 再五百年，又降风灾吹你。
candidates.sourceText: 再五百年，又降风灾吹你。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after another five hundred years, a wind calamity descends to blow you away.

candidates.canonicalSource: 这风不是东南西北风，不是和薰金朔风，亦不是花柳松竹风，唤做‘赑风’。
candidates.sourceText: 这风不是东南西北风，不是和薰金朔风，亦不是花柳松竹风，唤做‘赑风’。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this wind is neither the southeast, southwest, northeast, or northwest wind, neither the warm spring, or the metallic or pine winds; it is called ‘bi wind.’

candidates.canonicalSource: 自顖门中吹入六腑，过丹田，穿九窍，骨肉消疏，其身自解。
candidates.sourceText: 自顖门中吹入六腑，过丹田，穿九窍，骨肉消疏，其身自解。
candidates.conceptCanonical: it blows through the xunmen gate into the six internal organs, passes the elixir field, pierces the nine orifices, causing flesh and bones to thin and leading to self-destruction.

candidates.canonicalSource: 所以都要躲过。”
candidates.sourceText: 所以都要躲过。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: therefore, it is crucial to avoid all these.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空闻说，毛骨悚然，叩头礼拜道：“万望老爷垂悯，传与躲避三灾之法，到底不敢忘恩。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空闻说，毛骨悚然，叩头礼拜道：“万望老爷垂悯，传与躲避三灾之法，到底不敢忘恩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, wukong’s hair stood on end with dread. he kowtowed and said, “i earnestly hope master will kindly transmit the methods to avoid the three calamities; i will never forget your kindness.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“此亦无难，只是你比他人不同，故传不得。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“此亦无难，只是你比他人不同，故传不得。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “this is not difficult, but since you differ from others, i cannot teach you completely.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“我也头圆顶天，足方履地，一般有九窍四肢，五脏六腑，何以比人不同？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“我也头圆顶天，足方履地，一般有九窍四肢，五脏六腑，何以比人不同？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “my head is round like the sky, my feet square like the earth, with nine orifices, four limbs, five organs, and six entrails just like others; how am i different?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你虽然像人，却比人少腮。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你虽然像人，却比人少腮。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “though you resemble a human, you have fewer cheeks.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 原来那猴子孤拐面，凹脸尖嘴。
candidates.sourceText: 原来那猴子孤拐面，凹脸尖嘴。
candidates.conceptCanonical: indeed, that monkey had a lonely curved face with a sunken face and pointed mouth.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空伸手一摸，笑道：“师父没成算。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空伸手一摸，笑道：“师父没成算。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong reached out to feel and laughed, “master’s calculation is incomplete.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我虽少腮，却比人多这个素袋，亦可准折过也。”
candidates.sourceText: 我虽少腮，却比人多这个素袋，亦可准折过也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: though i have fewer cheeks, i have this vesica pouch, which can also be used for precise folding.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师说：“也罢，你要学那一般？
candidates.sourceText: 祖师说：“也罢，你要学那一般？
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “very well, which path do you wish to learn?

candidates.canonicalSource: 有一般天罡数，该三十六般变化；有一般地煞数，该七十二般变化。”
candidates.sourceText: 有一般天罡数，该三十六般变化；有一般地煞数，该七十二般变化。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: there is the number for the heavenly gang, corresponding to thirty-six transformations; and the number for the earth sha, corresponding to seventy-two transformations.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“弟子愿多里捞摸，学一个地煞变化罢。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“弟子愿多里捞摸，学一个地煞变化罢。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “your disciple wishes to try and learn the seventy-two transformations of the earth sha.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“既如此，上前来，传与你口诀。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“既如此，上前来，传与你口诀。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “in that case, come forward. i will teach you the incantation.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 遂附耳低言，不知说了些甚么妙法。
candidates.sourceText: 遂附耳低言，不知说了些甚么妙法。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he then leaned close to whisper some wondrous method, the details unknown.

candidates.canonicalSource: 这猴王也是他一窍通时百窍通，当时习了口诀，自修自炼，将七十二般变化都学成了。
candidates.sourceText: 这猴王也是他一窍通时百窍通，当时习了口诀，自修自炼，将七十二般变化都学成了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: this monkey king was one who, upon understanding one opening, mastered all seventy-two transformations. then, practicing alone and refining himself, he learned all seventy-two transformations perfectly.

candidates.canonicalSource: 忽一日，祖师与众门人在三星洞前戏玩晚景。
candidates.sourceText: 忽一日，祖师与众门人在三星洞前戏玩晚景。
candidates.conceptCanonical: one day, the patriarch and his fellow disciples were playing in the evening before the three stars cave.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“悟空，事成了未曾？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“悟空，事成了未曾？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “wukong, have you completed your task?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“多蒙师父海恩，弟子功果完备，已能霞举飞升也。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“多蒙师父海恩，弟子功果完备，已能霞举飞升也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “thanks to master’s great kindness, your disciple’s work is complete and i can now soar on clouds.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你试飞举我看。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你试飞举我看。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “try flying for me.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空弄本事，将身一耸，打了个连扯跟头，跳离地有五六丈，踏云霞去勾有顿饭之时，返复不上三里远近，落在面前，扠手道：“师父，这就是飞举腾云了。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空弄本事，将身一耸，打了个连扯跟头，跳离地有五六丈，踏云霞去勾有顿饭之时，返复不上三里远近，落在面前，扠手道：“师父，这就是飞举腾云了。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong demonstrated his skill, straightened his body, performed a somersault, jumped five or six zhang high, stepped onto a cloud, went to get a meal, and returned from no farther than three li, landing before the patriarch, leaning on his hands, and said, “master, this is flying and cloud soaring.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师笑道：“这个算不得腾云，只算得爬云而已。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师笑道：“这个算不得腾云，只算得爬云而已。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch laughed, “this does not count as cloud soaring, only cloud climbing.

candidates.canonicalSource: 自古道：‘神仙朝游北海暮苍梧。’
candidates.sourceText: 自古道：‘神仙朝游北海暮苍梧。’
candidates.conceptCanonical: since ancient times, it is said: ‘immortals travel north sea in the morning and mo cangwu in the evening.’

candidates.canonicalSource: 似你这半日，去不上三里，即爬云也还算不得哩。”
candidates.sourceText: 似你这半日，去不上三里，即爬云也还算不得哩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: like you, going no more than three li in half a day, this is far from even climbing clouds.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“怎么为‘朝游北海暮苍梧’？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“怎么为‘朝游北海暮苍梧’？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong asked, “what does ‘travel north sea in the morning and mo cangwu in the evening’ mean?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“凡腾云之辈，早辰起自北海，游过东海、西海、南海，复转苍梧。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“凡腾云之辈，早辰起自北海，游过东海、西海、南海，复转苍梧。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “all those who soar on clouds begin at dawn from the north sea, traveling over the east, west, and south seas, finally turning to cangwu.

candidates.canonicalSource: 苍梧者，却是北海零陵之语话也。
candidates.sourceText: 苍梧者，却是北海零陵之语话也。
candidates.conceptCanonical: cangwu, in fact, is a phrase from lingling in the north sea.

candidates.canonicalSource: 将四海之外，一日都游遍，方算得腾云。”
candidates.sourceText: 将四海之外，一日都游遍，方算得腾云。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: traveling all four seas in one day counts as true cloud soaring.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“这个却难，却难。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“这个却难，却难。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “that is difficult, indeed very difficult.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“世上无难事，只怕有心人。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“世上无难事，只怕有心人。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “there is no difficulty in this world, only those who lack determination.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空闻得此言，叩头礼拜，启道：“师父，为人须为彻，索性舍个大慈悲，将此腾云之法，一发传与我罢，决不敢忘恩。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空闻得此言，叩头礼拜，启道：“师父，为人须为彻，索性舍个大慈悲，将此腾云之法，一发传与我罢，决不敢忘恩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, wukong kowtowed and said, “master, one must be thorough; i simply ask for your great kindness to impart this cloud-soaring technique at once. i will never forget your grace.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“凡诸仙腾云，皆跌足而起，你却不是这般。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“凡诸仙腾云，皆跌足而起，你却不是这般。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “all immortals soar on clouds by pushing off the ground with their feet, but you are different.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我才见你去，连扯方才跳上。
candidates.sourceText: 我才见你去，连扯方才跳上。
candidates.conceptCanonical: i just saw you leap in a somersault to jump up.

candidates.canonicalSource: 我今只就你这个势，传你个斤斗云罢。”
candidates.sourceText: 我今只就你这个势，传你个斤斗云罢。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: now i will teach you the somersault cloud according to your method.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空又礼拜恳求，祖师却又传个口诀道：“这朵云，捻著诀，念动真言，攒紧了拳，将身一抖，跳将起来，一斤斗就有十万八千里路哩。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空又礼拜恳求，祖师却又传个口诀道：“这朵云，捻著诀，念动真言，攒紧了拳，将身一抖，跳将起来，一斤斗就有十万八千里路哩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong again kowtowed and pleaded; the patriarch then taught another incantation: “this cloud, twist the finger sign, recite the true words, clench your fist tightly; shake your body and jump up, one somersault covers 108,000 li.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 大众听说，一个个嘻嘻笑道：“悟空造化，若会这个法儿，与人家当铺兵、送文书、递报单，不管那里都寻了饭吃。”
candidates.sourceText: 大众听说，一个个嘻嘻笑道：“悟空造化，若会这个法儿，与人家当铺兵、送文书、递报单，不管那里都寻了饭吃。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, everyone laughed and said, “wukong is fortunate: if he masters this skill, he could carry soldiers, deliver documents, and carry messages anywhere and always find food.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 师徒们天昏各归洞府。
candidates.sourceText: 师徒们天昏各归洞府。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the teacher and disciples all returned to their caves as night fell.

candidates.canonicalSource: 这一夜，悟空即运神炼法，会了斤斗云。
candidates.sourceText: 这一夜，悟空即运神炼法，会了斤斗云。
candidates.conceptCanonical: that night, wukong practiced his magical refining method and mastered the somersault cloud.

candidates.canonicalSource: 逐日家无拘无束，自在逍遥，此亦长生之美。
candidates.sourceText: 逐日家无拘无束，自在逍遥，此亦长生之美。
candidates.conceptCanonical: day by day, free and unrestrained, carefree and at leisure, this too was the beauty of immortality.

candidates.canonicalSource: 一日，春归夏至，大众都在松树下会讲多时。
candidates.sourceText: 一日，春归夏至，大众都在松树下会讲多时。
candidates.conceptCanonical: one day, as spring turned to summer, the group gathered under a pine tree for a long discussion.

candidates.canonicalSource: 大众道：“悟空，你是那世修来的缘法？
candidates.sourceText: 大众道：“悟空，你是那世修来的缘法？
candidates.conceptCanonical: they asked, “wukong, from which fate have you cultivated your path?

candidates.canonicalSource: 前日老师父附耳低言，传与你的躲三灾变化之法，可都会么？”
candidates.sourceText: 前日老师父附耳低言，传与你的躲三灾变化之法，可都会么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the other day master whispered to you teaching the method to avoid the three calamities; can you manage it?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空笑道：“不瞒诸兄长说，一则是师父传授，二来也是我昼夜殷勤，那几般儿都会了。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空笑道：“不瞒诸兄长说，一则是师父传授，二来也是我昼夜殷勤，那几般儿都会了。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong laughed, “i will not hide it from my elder brothers: partly it is taught by master, and also my own diligent day and night. i have mastered those methods.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 大众道：“趁此良时，你试演演，让我等看看。”
candidates.sourceText: 大众道：“趁此良时，你试演演，让我等看看。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: they said, “take this good opportunity and demonstrate for us.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空闻说，抖擞精神，卖弄手段道：“众师兄请出个题目。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空闻说，抖擞精神，卖弄手段道：“众师兄请出个题目。
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, wukong braced himself and showed off, “brethren, please give me a subject.

candidates.canonicalSource: 要我变化甚么？”
candidates.sourceText: 要我变化甚么？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: what shall i transform into?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 大众道：“就变棵松树罢。”
candidates.sourceText: 大众道：“就变棵松树罢。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: they said, “just transform into a pine tree.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空捻著诀，念动咒语，摇身一变，就变做一棵松树。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空捻著诀，念动咒语，摇身一变，就变做一棵松树。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong twisted the finger sign, recited the incantation, shook his body, and transformed into a pine tree.

candidates.canonicalSource: 大众见了鼓掌，呵呵大笑，都道：“好猴儿，好猴儿！”
candidates.sourceText: 大众见了鼓掌，呵呵大笑，都道：“好猴儿，好猴儿！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: they applauded and laughed heartily, all saying, “good monkey, good monkey!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 不觉的嚷闹，惊动了祖师。
candidates.sourceText: 不觉的嚷闹，惊动了祖师。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the noisy commotion unexpectedly startled the patriarch.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师急拽杖出门来问道：“是何人在此喧哗？”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师急拽杖出门来问道：“是何人在此喧哗？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch hurriedly grabbed his staff and came out, asking, “who is making noise here?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 大众闻呼，慌忙检束，整衣向前。
candidates.sourceText: 大众闻呼，慌忙检束，整衣向前。
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, the crowd hurried to tidy themselves and arranged their clothes as they stepped forward.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空也现了本相，杂在丛中道：“启上尊师：我等在此会讲，更无外姓喧哗。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空也现了本相，杂在丛中道：“启上尊师：我等在此会讲，更无外姓喧哗。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong revealed his true form, blending into the crowd, and said, “respectful master, we were meeting here peacefully. no outsiders caused the noise.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师怒喝道：“你等大呼小叫，全不像个修行的体段！
candidates.sourceText: 祖师怒喝道：“你等大呼小叫，全不像个修行的体段！
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch shouted angrily, “you all make a racket, nothing like the demeanor of cultivators!

candidates.canonicalSource: 修行的人，口开神气散，舌动是非生，如何在此嚷笑？”
candidates.sourceText: 修行的人，口开神气散，舌动是非生，如何在此嚷笑？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: cultivators clear their minds and speak with care; tongue stirs strife — how can you laugh and shout so?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 大众道：“不敢瞒师父，适才孙悟空演变化耍子。
candidates.sourceText: 大众道：“不敢瞒师父，适才孙悟空演变化耍子。
candidates.conceptCanonical: they replied, “not daring to hide from master, just now sun wukong performed transformations.

candidates.canonicalSource: 教他变棵松树，果然是棵松树，弟子们俱称扬喝采，故高声惊冒尊师，望乞恕罪。”
candidates.sourceText: 教他变棵松树，果然是棵松树，弟子们俱称扬喝采，故高声惊冒尊师，望乞恕罪。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: he turned into a pine tree, truly a pine tree, and the disciples praised and cheered loudly, unintentionally disturbing you. we beg for forgiveness.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你等起去。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你等起去。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “you all may disperse.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 叫：“悟空过来！
candidates.sourceText: 叫：“悟空过来！
candidates.conceptCanonical: calling out, “wukong, come here!

candidates.canonicalSource: 我问你弄甚么精神，变甚么松树？
candidates.sourceText: 我问你弄甚么精神，变甚么松树？
candidates.conceptCanonical: i ask you what spirit possessed you to transform into a pine tree?

candidates.canonicalSource: 这个工夫，可好在人前卖弄？
candidates.sourceText: 这个工夫，可好在人前卖弄？
candidates.conceptCanonical: is this the time to show off in front of others?

candidates.canonicalSource: 假如你见别人有，不要求他？
candidates.sourceText: 假如你见别人有，不要求他？
candidates.conceptCanonical: if you see others have something, don’t demand it from them?

candidates.canonicalSource: 别人见你有，必然求你。
candidates.sourceText: 别人见你有，必然求你。
candidates.conceptCanonical: if others see you have it, they will surely want it.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你若畏祸，却要传他；若不传他，必然加害：你之性命又不可保。”
candidates.sourceText: 你若畏祸，却要传他；若不传他，必然加害：你之性命又不可保。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: if you fear disaster, you should share it; if not, harm will befall you, and your life cannot be preserved.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空叩头道：“只望师父恕罪。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空叩头道：“只望师父恕罪。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong kowtowed, saying, “i only hope master will forgive me.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“我也不罪你，但只是你去罢。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“我也不罪你，但只是你去罢。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “i do not blame you, but you must leave.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空闻此言，满眼堕泪道：“师父，教我往那里去？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空闻此言，满眼堕泪道：“师父，教我往那里去？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: upon hearing this, wukong’s eyes filled with tears: “master, where should i go?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你从那里来，便从那里去就是了。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你从那里来，便从那里去就是了。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “go back where you came from.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空顿然醒悟道：“我自东胜神洲傲来国花果山水帘洞来的。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空顿然醒悟道：“我自东胜神洲傲来国花果山水帘洞来的。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong suddenly realized, saying, “i came from flower-fruit mountain water curtain cave in aolai country of eastern shengshen continent.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你快回去，全你性命；若在此间，断然不可。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你快回去，全你性命；若在此间，断然不可。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “you should return quickly to preserve your life; if you stay here, that is absolutely impossible.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空领罪，上告尊师：“我也离家有二十年矣，虽是回顾旧日儿孙，但念师父厚恩未报，不敢去。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空领罪，上告尊师：“我也离家有二十年矣，虽是回顾旧日儿孙，但念师父厚恩未报，不敢去。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong accepted his fault and reported to the patriarch, “i have been away from home twenty years. although i long to see descendants, i dare not go because i have yet to repay the master’s great kindness.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“那里甚么恩义，你只不惹祸，不牵带我就罢了。”
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“那里甚么恩义，你只不惹祸，不牵带我就罢了。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “what kindness? just don’t cause trouble or drag me into it.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空见没奈何，只得拜辞，与众相别。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空见没奈何，只得拜辞，与众相别。
candidates.conceptCanonical: seeing no alternative, wukong bowed farewell and parted from the group.

candidates.canonicalSource: 祖师道：“你这去，定生不良。
candidates.sourceText: 祖师道：“你这去，定生不良。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the patriarch said, “your going will surely bring misfortune.

candidates.canonicalSource: 凭你怎么惹祸行凶，却不许说是我的徒弟。
candidates.sourceText: 凭你怎么惹祸行凶，却不许说是我的徒弟。
candidates.conceptCanonical: no matter what trouble you cause or whom you harm, do not say you are my disciple.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 你说出半个字来，我就知之，把你这猢狲剥皮锉骨，将神魂贬在九幽之处，教你万劫不得翻身！”
candidates.sourceText: 你说出半个字来，我就知之，把你这猢狲剥皮锉骨，将神魂贬在九幽之处，教你万劫不得翻身！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: if you utter a single word, i'll know it. i'll skin you alive, rasp your bones, and banish your soul to the nine netherworlds, condemning you to eternal damnation, with no hope of redemption!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“决不敢提起师父一字，只说是我自家会的便罢。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“决不敢提起师父一字，只说是我自家会的便罢。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "i dare not mention my master even once; i'll just say it's something i learned myself."

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空谢了，即抽身，捻著诀，丢个连扯，纵起斤斗云，径回东胜。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空谢了，即抽身，捻著诀，丢个连扯，纵起斤斗云，径回东胜。
candidates.conceptCanonical: after thanking him, wukong withdrew, twisted his finger sign, threw a lasso, mounted his somersault cloud, and headed straight back to the east shengshen.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那里消一个时辰，早看见花果山水帘洞。
candidates.sourceText: 那里消一个时辰，早看见花果山水帘洞。
candidates.conceptCanonical: before an hour had passed, he already saw the water curtain cave on flower-fruit mountain.

candidates.canonicalSource: 美猴王自知快乐，暗暗的自称道：
candidates.sourceText: 美猴王自知快乐，暗暗的自称道：
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king, feeling joyful, quietly said to himself:

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空按下云头，直至花果山，找路而走。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空按下云头，直至花果山，找路而走。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong descended from the cloud right to flower-fruit mountain and looked for a path to walk.

candidates.canonicalSource: 忽听得鹤唳猿啼：鹤唳声冲霄汉外，猿啼悲切甚伤情。
candidates.sourceText: 忽听得鹤唳猿啼：鹤唳声冲霄汉外，猿啼悲切甚伤情。
candidates.conceptCanonical: suddenly he heard the cries of cranes and apes: the crane's call soared beyond the skies, the apes' howls were sorrowful and deeply moving.

candidates.canonicalSource: 即开口叫道：“孩儿们，我来了也！”
candidates.sourceText: 即开口叫道：“孩儿们，我来了也！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: he immediately shouted, “children, i have come!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 那崖下石坎边，花草中，树木里，若大若小之猴，跳出千千万万，把个美猴王围在当中，叩头叫道：“大王，你好宽心，怎么一去许久？
candidates.sourceText: 那崖下石坎边，花草中，树木里，若大若小之猴，跳出千千万万，把个美猴王围在当中，叩头叫道：“大王，你好宽心，怎么一去许久？
candidates.conceptCanonical: by the stone steps beneath the cliff, among the flowers and grass and trees, countless monkeys of all sizes jumped out in thousands and ten thousands, surrounding the handsome monkey king, kowtowing and calling out, “great king, you are so considerate. why have you been gone so long?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 把我们俱闪在这里，望你诚如饥渴。
candidates.sourceText: 把我们俱闪在这里，望你诚如饥渴。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “you left us all here, anxiously waiting for you as if starving and thirsting.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 近来被一妖魔在此欺虐，强要占我们水帘洞府，是我等舍死忘生，与他争斗。
candidates.sourceText: 近来被一妖魔在此欺虐，强要占我们水帘洞府，是我等舍死忘生，与他争斗。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “recently, a demon has been bullying us here, trying to seize our water curtain cave. we have risked life and limb in battle against him.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 这些时，被那厮抢了我们家火，捉了许多子侄，教我们昼夜无眠，看守家业。
candidates.sourceText: 这些时，被那厮抢了我们家火，捉了许多子侄，教我们昼夜无眠，看守家业。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “during this time, that fiend stole our family fire, captured many nephews and kin, causing us sleepless days and nights guarding our home.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 幸得大王来了，大王若再年载不来，我等连山洞尽属他人矣。”
candidates.sourceText: 幸得大王来了，大王若再年载不来，我等连山洞尽属他人矣。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “luckily, great king has come. if you stay away another year or so, our whole cave will belong to others.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空闻说，心中大怒，道：“是甚么妖魔，辄敢无状？
candidates.sourceText: 悟空闻说，心中大怒，道：“是甚么妖魔，辄敢无状？
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, wukong grew furious and said, “what kind of demon dares to act so outrageously?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 你且细细说来，待我寻他报仇。”
candidates.sourceText: 你且细细说来，待我寻他报仇。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “tell me slowly; i will look for him and avenge you.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴叩头：“告上大王：那厮自称混世魔王，住居在直北下。”
candidates.sourceText: 众猴叩头：“告上大王：那厮自称混世魔王，住居在直北下。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkeys kowtowed and said, “we report to great king: that fiend calls himself the chaotic world demon king and lives directly to the north-east.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“此间到他那里，有多少路程？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“此间到他那里，有多少路程？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong asked, “how far is it from here to his place?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴道：“他来时云，去时雾，或风或雨，或电或雷，我等不知有多少路。”
candidates.sourceText: 众猴道：“他来时云，去时雾，或风或雨，或电或雷，我等不知有多少路。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkeys answered, “when he comes, it's with clouds; when he leaves, it's with fog; sometimes wind, rain, thunder or lightning. we do not know how many miles away.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“既如此，你们休怕，且自顽耍，等我寻他去来。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“既如此，你们休怕，且自顽耍，等我寻他去来。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “if that's so, don't be afraid. play as you please; i'll go look for him and come back.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 好猴王，将身一纵，跳起去，一路斤斗，直至北下观看，见一座高山，真是十分险峻。
candidates.sourceText: 好猴王，将身一纵，跳起去，一路斤斗，直至北下观看，见一座高山，真是十分险峻。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king leaped up in one bound and somersaulted straight to the north-east to investigate, finding a mountain that was truly steep and forbidding.

candidates.canonicalSource: 好山：
candidates.sourceText: 好山：
candidates.conceptCanonical: what a fine mountain it was!

candidates.canonicalSource: 美猴王正默观看景致，只听得有人言语，径自下山寻觅。
candidates.sourceText: 美猴王正默观看景致，只听得有人言语，径自下山寻觅。
candidates.conceptCanonical: while the handsome monkey king was silently observing the scenery, he suddenly heard voices and went straight down the mountain to investigate.

candidates.canonicalSource: 原来那陡崖之前，乃是那水脏洞。
candidates.sourceText: 原来那陡崖之前，乃是那水脏洞。
candidates.conceptCanonical: it turned out that just before the steep cliff was the dirty water cave.

candidates.canonicalSource: 洞门外有几个小妖跳舞，见了悟空就走。
candidates.sourceText: 洞门外有几个小妖跳舞，见了悟空就走。
candidates.conceptCanonical: outside the cave entrance, several little demons were dancing; when they saw wukong, they fled.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“休走！
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“休走！
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, "don't run!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 借你口中言，传我心内事。
candidates.sourceText: 借你口中言，传我心内事。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “use your mouth to speak the truth in my heart.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 我乃正南方花果山水帘洞洞主。
candidates.sourceText: 我乃正南方花果山水帘洞洞主。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “i am the rightful cave master of the flower-fruit mountain water curtain cave in the south.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 你家甚么混世鸟魔，屡次欺我儿孙，我特寻来，要与他见个上下。”
candidates.sourceText: 你家甚么混世鸟魔，屡次欺我儿孙，我特寻来，要与他见个上下。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “your chaotic bird demon has repeatedly bullied my descendants. i have come specifically to meet him and set things straight.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 那小妖听说，疾忙跑入洞里报道：“大王，祸事了！”
candidates.sourceText: 那小妖听说，疾忙跑入洞里报道：“大王，祸事了！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, the little demon hurried inside the cave to report, “great king, there's trouble!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 魔王道：“有甚祸事？”
candidates.sourceText: 魔王道：“有甚祸事？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon king asked, “what trouble?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 小妖道：“洞外有猴头称为花果山水帘洞洞主，他说你屡次欺他儿孙，特来寻你，见个上下哩。”
candidates.sourceText: 小妖道：“洞外有猴头称为花果山水帘洞洞主，他说你屡次欺他儿孙，特来寻你，见个上下哩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the little demon said, “outside the cave, a monkey head claiming to be the master of flower-fruit mountain water curtain cave says that you have repeatedly bullied his descendants and has come to meet you and sort things out.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 魔王笑道：“我常闻得那些猴精说他有个大王，出家修行去，想是今番来了。
candidates.sourceText: 魔王笑道：“我常闻得那些猴精说他有个大王，出家修行去，想是今番来了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon king laughed and said, “i've often heard those monkey spirits say they have a great king who went on a spiritual journey; maybe it's him this time.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 你们见他怎生打扮？
candidates.sourceText: 你们见他怎生打扮？
candidates.conceptCanonical: “what does he look like?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 有甚器械？”
candidates.sourceText: 有甚器械？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “what kind of weapons does he have?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 小妖道：“他也没甚么器械，光著个头，穿一领红色衣，勒一条黄绦，足下踏一对乌靴，不僧不俗，又不像道士、神仙，赤手空拳，在门外叫哩。”
candidates.sourceText: 小妖道：“他也没甚么器械，光著个头，穿一领红色衣，勒一条黄绦，足下踏一对乌靴，不僧不俗，又不像道士、神仙，赤手空拳，在门外叫哩。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the little demon said, “he carries no weapon. he's bareheaded, wears a red robe, a yellow sash, and steps on a pair of black boots. neither monk nor immortal, just naked fists, shouting at the door.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 魔王闻说：“取我披挂、兵器来。”
candidates.sourceText: 魔王闻说：“取我披挂、兵器来。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon king said, “bring me my armor and weapons.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 那小妖即时取出。
candidates.sourceText: 那小妖即时取出。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the little demon immediately took them out.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那魔王穿了甲胄，绰刀在手，与众妖出得门来，即高声叫道：“那个是水帘洞洞主？”
candidates.sourceText: 那魔王穿了甲胄，绰刀在手，与众妖出得门来，即高声叫道：“那个是水帘洞洞主？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon king donned his armor and wielded his sword. with a troop of demons, he stepped out the door and shouted loudly, “who is the master of water curtain cave?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空急睁睛观看，只见那魔王：
candidates.sourceText: 悟空急睁睛观看，只见那魔王：
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong opened his eyes wide to see the demon king:

candidates.canonicalSource: 魔王见了，笑道：“你身不满四尺，年不过三旬，手内又无兵器，怎么大胆猖狂，要寻我见甚么上下？”
candidates.sourceText: 魔王见了，笑道：“你身不满四尺，年不过三旬，手内又无兵器，怎么大胆猖狂，要寻我见甚么上下？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon king laughed when he saw him and said, “you are less than four feet tall, not over thirty years old, and wield no weapons—how dare you act so boldly and want to meet me face to face?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空骂道：“你这泼魔，原来没眼。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空骂道：“你这泼魔，原来没眼。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong cursed, “you shameless demon, you must be blind.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你量我小，要大却也不难；你量我无兵器，我两只手勾著天边月哩。
candidates.sourceText: 你量我小，要大却也不难；你量我无兵器，我两只手勾著天边月哩。
candidates.conceptCanonical: you see me small, but making myself big is not hard; you say i have no weapons, but my two hands hook the moon at the horizon.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你不要怕，只吃老孙一拳。”
candidates.sourceText: 你不要怕，只吃老孙一拳。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: don't be afraid, you'll get just one punch from old sun.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 纵一纵，跳上去，劈脸就打。
candidates.sourceText: 纵一纵，跳上去，劈脸就打。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he surged forward and jumped up, striking the demon squarely in the face.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那魔王伸手架住道：“你这般矬矮，我这般高长；你要使拳，我要使刀。
candidates.sourceText: 那魔王伸手架住道：“你这般矬矮，我这般高长；你要使拳，我要使刀。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon stretched out his hand to block, saying, “you're short and small, i'm tall and long; you use fists, i use a sword.

candidates.canonicalSource: 使刀就杀了你，也吃人笑。
candidates.sourceText: 使刀就杀了你，也吃人笑。
candidates.conceptCanonical: using a sword i could slaughter you, but that would be too easy.

candidates.canonicalSource: 待我放下刀，与你使路拳看。”
candidates.sourceText: 待我放下刀，与你使路拳看。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: let me put down my sword and spar with fists.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“说得是。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“说得是。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “well said.

candidates.canonicalSource: 好汉子，走来。”
candidates.sourceText: 好汉子，走来。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: good man, come here.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 那魔王丢开架子便打，这悟空钻进去相撞相迎。
candidates.sourceText: 那魔王丢开架子便打，这悟空钻进去相撞相迎。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon immediately dropped his stance and fought. wukong slipped in and collided head-on.

candidates.canonicalSource: 他两个拳捶脚踢，一冲一撞。
candidates.sourceText: 他两个拳捶脚踢，一冲一撞。
candidates.conceptCanonical: their fists pounded and legs kicked as they clashed fiercely.

candidates.canonicalSource: 原来长拳空大，短簇坚牢。
candidates.sourceText: 原来长拳空大，短簇坚牢。
candidates.conceptCanonical: it turned out the demon's long fists were empty but large, and wukong's short cluster strikes solid and tough.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那魔王被悟空掏短胁，撞了裆，几下觔节，把他打重了。
candidates.sourceText: 那魔王被悟空掏短胁，撞了裆，几下觔节，把他打重了。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the demon was struck in the ribs and groin by wukong several times, badly hurting him.

candidates.canonicalSource: 他闪过，拿起那板大的钢刀，望悟空劈头就砍。
candidates.sourceText: 他闪过，拿起那板大的钢刀，望悟空劈头就砍。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he dodged, grabbed the large steel blade, and swung it down at wukong's head.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空见他凶猛，即使身外身法，拔一把毫毛，丢在口中嚼碎，望空喷去，叫一声：“变！”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空见他凶猛，即使身外身法，拔一把毫毛，丢在口中嚼碎，望空喷去，叫一声：“变！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: seeing the demon's ferocity, wukong used his body-double technique, plucked a hair from his body, chewed it in his mouth, spat it out, and shouted, “transform!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 即变做三、二百个小猴，周围攒簇。
candidates.sourceText: 即变做三、二百个小猴，周围攒簇。
candidates.conceptCanonical: he immediately transformed into two or three hundred little monkeys swarming around closely.

candidates.canonicalSource: 原来人得仙体，出神变化无方。
candidates.sourceText: 原来人得仙体，出神变化无方。
candidates.conceptCanonical: for a being with an immortal body, magical transformations are limitless.

candidates.canonicalSource: 不知这猴王自从了道之后，身上有八万四千毛羽，根根能变，应物随心。
candidates.sourceText: 不知这猴王自从了道之后，身上有八万四千毛羽，根根能变，应物随心。
candidates.conceptCanonical: since studying the way, the monkey king had 84,000 hairs on his body, each able to transform at will to suit the situation.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那些小猴眼乖会跳，刀来砍不著，枪去不能伤。
candidates.sourceText: 那些小猴眼乖会跳，刀来砍不著，枪去不能伤。
candidates.conceptCanonical: those little monkeys darted nimbly, dodging sword strikes and spear thrusts unharmed.

candidates.canonicalSource: 你看他前踊后跃，钻上去，把个魔王围绕，抱的抱，扯的扯，钻裆的钻裆，扳脚的扳脚，踢打挦毛，抠眼睛，捻鼻子，抬鼓弄，直打做一个攒盘。
candidates.sourceText: 你看他前踊后跃，钻上去，把个魔王围绕，抱的抱，扯的扯，钻裆的钻裆，扳脚的扳脚，踢打挦毛，抠眼睛，捻鼻子，抬鼓弄，直打做一个攒盘。
candidates.conceptCanonical: see them leap front and back, swarming and surrounding the demon king, hugging, pulling, poking, grabbing legs, kicking, clawing fur, poking eyes, pinching noses, lifting drumsticks, beating him into a tangled mess.

candidates.canonicalSource: 这悟空才去夺得他的刀来，分开小猴，照顶门一下，砍为两段。
candidates.sourceText: 这悟空才去夺得他的刀来，分开小猴，照顶门一下，砍为两段。
candidates.conceptCanonical: only then did wukong snatch the demon's sword, separate the little monkeys, and strike a heavy blow to the crown of the head, splitting the sword into two halves.

candidates.canonicalSource: 领众杀进洞中，将那大小妖精尽皆剿灭。
candidates.sourceText: 领众杀进洞中，将那大小妖精尽皆剿灭。
candidates.conceptCanonical: leading his troop, he stormed into the cave and annihilated all the demons large and small.

candidates.canonicalSource: 却把毫毛一抖，收上身来，又见那收不上身者，却是那魔王在水帘洞擒去的小猴。
candidates.sourceText: 却把毫毛一抖，收上身来，又见那收不上身者，却是那魔王在水帘洞擒去的小猴。
candidates.conceptCanonical: then he shook his hairs to collect them back to his body, but saw one hair that wouldn't return—it was one of the monkeys the demon king had captured in the water curtain cave.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“汝等何为到此？”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“汝等何为到此？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “why are you all here?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 约有三五十个，都含泪道：“我等因大王修仙去后，这两年被他争吵，把我们都摄将来。
candidates.sourceText: 约有三五十个，都含泪道：“我等因大王修仙去后，这两年被他争吵，把我们都摄将来。
candidates.conceptCanonical: about thirty to fifty of them, all tearful, said, “since the great king went to cultivate immortality, for these two years he has been quarreling with that fellow, who captured us all.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 那不是我们洞中的家火？
candidates.sourceText: 那不是我们洞中的家火？
candidates.conceptCanonical: “isn't that our home fire?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 石盆、石碗都被这厮拿来也。”
candidates.sourceText: 石盆、石碗都被这厮拿来也。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “stone bowls and stone basins were all taken by that villain.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“既是我们的家火，你们都搬出外去。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“既是我们的家火，你们都搬出外去。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “if they are our home items, you must move them all outside.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 随即洞里放起火来，把那水脏洞烧得枯干，尽归了一体。
candidates.sourceText: 随即洞里放起火来，把那水脏洞烧得枯干，尽归了一体。
candidates.conceptCanonical: then he set fire inside the cave, burning the dirty water cave completely dry, reclaiming the entire place.

candidates.canonicalSource: 对众道：“汝等跟我回去。”
candidates.sourceText: 对众道：“汝等跟我回去。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: he told them, “you all follow me back.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴道：“大王，我们来时，只听得耳边风响，虚飘飘到于此地，更不识路径，今怎得回乡？”
candidates.sourceText: 众猴道：“大王，我们来时，只听得耳边风响，虚飘飘到于此地，更不识路径，今怎得回乡？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkeys said, “great king, when we came, we only heard the sounds of the wind and found ourselves here without knowing the path. how can we return home?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“这是他弄的个术法儿，有何难也？
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“这是他弄的个术法儿，有何难也？
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “this is a magic trick that he used. it's nothing difficult.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 我如今一窍通，百窍通，我也会弄。
candidates.sourceText: 我如今一窍通，百窍通，我也会弄。
candidates.conceptCanonical: “now that i understand one point, i understand all points. i can do it too.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 你们都合了眼，休怕。”
candidates.sourceText: 你们都合了眼，休怕。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “close your eyes and don't be afraid.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 好猴王，念声咒语，驾阵狂风，云头落下。
candidates.sourceText: 好猴王，念声咒语，驾阵狂风，云头落下。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the handsome monkey king chanted an incantation, summoned a wild wind formation, and descended the cloud.

candidates.canonicalSource: 叫：“孩儿们睁眼。”
candidates.sourceText: 叫：“孩儿们睁眼。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: he shouted, “children, open your eyes.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴脚躧实地，认得是家乡，个个欢喜，都奔洞门旧路。
candidates.sourceText: 众猴脚躧实地，认得是家乡，个个欢喜，都奔洞门旧路。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkeys felt their feet firmly on the ground, recognizing their homeland, each delighted and rushing along the old path to the cave entrance.

candidates.canonicalSource: 那在洞众猴，都一齐簇拥同入，分班序齿，礼拜猴王。
candidates.sourceText: 那在洞众猴，都一齐簇拥同入，分班序齿，礼拜猴王。
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkeys inside the cave all gathered to enter together, arranged by ranks and age, and kowtowed to the monkey king.

candidates.canonicalSource: 安排酒果，接风贺喜，启问降魔救子之事。
candidates.sourceText: 安排酒果，接风贺喜，启问降魔救子之事。
candidates.conceptCanonical: they prepared wine and fruit to welcome and celebrate, asking about the matter of subduing the demon and rescuing their children.

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空备细言了一遍，众猴称扬不尽道：“大王去到那方，不意学得这般手段。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空备细言了一遍，众猴称扬不尽道：“大王去到那方，不意学得这般手段。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong explained everything in detail, and the monkeys praised him greatly, saying, “great king, wherever you went, we never expected you’d learn such skills.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空又道：“我当年别汝等，随波逐流，飘过东洋大海，到西牛贺洲地界，径至南赡部洲，学成人像，著此衣，穿此履，摆摆摇摇，云游了八九年馀，更不曾有道。
candidates.sourceText: 悟空又道：“我当年别汝等，随波逐流，飘过东洋大海，到西牛贺洲地界，径至南赡部洲，学成人像，著此衣，穿此履，摆摆摇摇，云游了八九年馀，更不曾有道。
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong further said, “when i left you, i drifted with the current, floating across the eastern ocean, to the domain of west niuhes, and straight to south zanbu, where i learned human ways—wearing these clothes, wearing these shoes, wandering for eight or nine years with no enlightenment.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 又渡西洋大海，到西牛贺洲地界，访问多时，幸遇一老祖，传了我与天同寿的真功果，不死长生的大法门。”
candidates.sourceText: 又渡西洋大海，到西牛贺洲地界，访问多时，幸遇一老祖，传了我与天同寿的真功果，不死长生的大法门。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “then i crossed the western ocean to west niuhes again, and after much visiting, luckily met an old patriarch who taught me the great truth of eternal life and immortality, a secret technique that grants longevity like the heavens.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴称贺，都道：“万劫难逢也！”
candidates.sourceText: 众猴称贺，都道：“万劫难逢也！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkeys congratulated him, saying, “such a chance comes once in ten thousand eons!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空又笑道：“小的们，又喜我这一门皆有姓氏。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空又笑道：“小的们，又喜我这一门皆有姓氏。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong laughed again and said, “little ones, are you pleased my new teachings all have surnames?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴道：“大王姓甚？”
candidates.sourceText: 众猴道：“大王姓甚？”
candidates.conceptCanonical: the monkeys asked, “great king, what is your surname?”

candidates.canonicalSource: 悟空道：“我今姓孙，法名悟空。”
candidates.sourceText: 悟空道：“我今姓孙，法名悟空。”
candidates.conceptCanonical: wukong said, “now my surname is sun, and my dharma name is wukong.”

candidates.canonicalSource: 众猴闻说，鼓掌忻然道：“大王是老孙，我们都是二孙、三孙、细孙、小孙……
candidates.sourceText: 众猴闻说，鼓掌忻然道：“大王是老孙，我们都是二孙、三孙、细孙、小孙……
candidates.conceptCanonical: hearing this, the monkeys applauded joyfully, saying, “great king is old sun, and we are all second suns, third suns, young suns, and small suns...”

candidates.canonicalSource: 一家孙、一国孙、一窝孙矣！”
candidates.sourceText: 一家孙、一国孙、一窝孙矣！”
candidates.conceptCanonical: “one big family of suns, one nation of suns, one troop of suns!”

candidates.canonicalSource: 都来奉承老孙，大盆小碗的椰子酒、葡萄酒、仙花、仙果，真个是合家欢乐。
candidates.sourceText: 都来奉承老孙，大盆小碗的椰子酒、葡萄酒、仙花、仙果，真个是合家欢乐。
candidates.conceptCanonical: they all came to flatter old sun, presenting large bowls and small cups of coconut wine, grape wine, celestial flowers, and celestial fruits—truly a family rejoicing.

candidates.canonicalSource: 咦！
candidates.sourceText: 咦！
candidates.conceptCanonical: ah!

candidates.canonicalSource: 毕竟不知怎生结果，居此界终始如何，且听下回分解。
candidates.sourceText: 毕竟不知怎生结果，居此界终始如何，且听下回分解。
candidates.conceptCanonical: still, how it all ends, and what happens thereafter in this world, will be told in the next chapter.

occurrences.text: 花果山

occurrences.before: ”众猴把他围住，问道：“里面怎么样？水有多深？”
occurrences.text: 石猴道：“没水！没水！原来是一座铁板桥，桥那边是一座天造地设的家当。
occurrences.after: ”众猴道：“怎见得是个家当？”石猴笑道：“这股水

annotations.canonicalSource: it is said that the count of heaven and earth consists of 129,600 years as one full cycle.

translations.targetText: It is said that the count of Heaven and Earth consists of 129,600 years as one full cycle.

annotations.canonicalSource: this cycle is divided into twelve segments, known as the twelve earthly branches: zi, chou, yin, mao, chen, si, wu, wei, shen, you, xu, and hai.

translations.targetText: This cycle is divided into twelve segments, known as the twelve earthly branches: Zi, Chou, Yin, Mao, Chen, Si, Wu, Wei, Shen, You, Xu, and Hai.

annotations.canonicalSource: each segment lasts 18,000 years.

translations.targetText: Each segment lasts 18,000 years.

annotations.canonicalSource: considering a single day: at the hour of zi, yang energy arises; at chou, the rooster crows; at yin, there is no sunlight; at mao, the sun rises; at chen, people have their meal; at si, it’s time to rest; at midday (wu), the sun is at its peak; at wei, the sun moves westward; at shen, it is evening; at you, the sun sets; at xu, twilight falls; and at hai, all is still.

translations.targetText: Considering a single day: at the hour of Zi, yang energy arises; at Chou, the rooster crows; at Yin, there is no sunlight; at Mao, the sun rises; at Chen, people have their meal; at Si, it’s time to rest; at midday (Wu), the sun is at its peak; at Wei, the sun moves westward; at Shen, it is evening; at You, the sun sets; at Xu, twilight falls; and at Hai, all is still.

annotations.canonicalSource: imagine vast cycles; when the xu segment ends, heaven and earth darken, and all things perish.

translations.targetText: Imagine vast cycles; when the Xu segment ends, Heaven and Earth darken, and all things perish.

annotations.canonicalSource: five thousand four hundred years later, at the beginning of the hai segment, there is darkness, and all beings vanish between these periods — hence called chaos.

translations.targetText: Five thousand four hundred years later, at the beginning of the Hai segment, there is darkness, and all beings vanish between these periods — hence called chaos.

annotations.canonicalSource: another 5,400 years later, as hai nears its end and the cycle approaches zi again, clarity slowly returns.

translations.targetText: Another 5,400 years later, as Hai nears its end and the cycle approaches Zi again, clarity slowly returns.

annotations.canonicalSource: as shao kangjie stated: “at the midpoint of zi during the winter solstice, the celestial center remains unmoved.

translations.targetText: As Shao Kangjie stated: “At the midpoint of Zi during the winter solstice, the celestial center remains unmoved.

annotations.canonicalSource: this is where the first motion of yang begins, before all things are born.”

translations.targetText: This is where the first motion of yang begins, before all things are born.”

annotations.canonicalSource: at this point, heaven begins to have a foundation.

translations.targetText: At this point, Heaven begins to have a foundation.

annotations.canonicalSource: another 5,400 years pass until the start of the zi segment, when lightness rises; there is the sun, the moon, the stars, and constellations.

translations.targetText: The sun, moon, stars, and constellations are called the Four Symbols.

annotations.canonicalSource: thus, it is said that heaven opens at zi.

translations.targetText: Thus, it is said that Heaven opens at Zi.

annotations.canonicalSource: after another 5,400 years, as zi ends and chou approaches, solidity gradually forms.

translations.targetText: After another 5,400 years, as Zi ends and Chou approaches, solidity gradually forms.

annotations.canonicalSource: the "yi jing" states: “great is the primal force of qian!

translations.targetText: The "Yi Jing" states: “Great is the primal force of Qian!

annotations.canonicalSource: exalted is the primal force of kun!

translations.targetText: Exalted is the primal force of Kun!

annotations.canonicalSource: all things are born from this foundation, following the will of heaven.”

translations.targetText: All things are born from this foundation, following the will of Heaven.”

annotations.canonicalSource: at this stage, earth begins to consolidate.

translations.targetText: At this stage, Earth begins to consolidate.

annotations.canonicalSource: going forward yet another 5,400 years until chou, heaviness and turbidity settle below; water, fire, mountains, stones, and earth appear.

translations.targetText: Going forward yet another 5,400 years until Chou, heaviness and turbidity settle below; water, fire, mountains, stones, and earth appear.

annotations.canonicalSource: water, fire, mountains, stones, and earth are called the five forms.

translations.targetText: Water, fire, mountains, stones, and earth are called the Five Forms.

annotations.canonicalSource: therefore, it is said that earth is shaped at chou.

translations.targetText: Therefore, it is said that Earth is shaped at Chou.

annotations.canonicalSource: another 5,400 years pass, chou ends and yin begins; all things come into being.

translations.targetText: Another 5,400 years pass, Chou ends and Yin begins; all things come into being.

annotations.canonicalSource: the calendar says: “heaven’s qi descends, earth’s qi ascends; heaven and earth unite, and all creatures are born.”

translations.targetText: The calendar says: “Heaven’s qi descends, Earth’s qi ascends; Heaven and Earth unite, and all creatures are born.”

annotations.canonicalSource: at this moment, heaven is clear and earth refreshing; yin and yang combine.

translations.targetText: At this moment, Heaven is clear and Earth refreshing; yin and yang combine.

annotations.canonicalSource: after yet another 5,400 years, during yin, humans, beasts, and birds are born — this is the establishment of heaven, earth, and humanity as the three powers.

annotations.canonicalSource: hence, it is said that humans are born at yin.

translations.targetText: Hence, it is said that humans are born at Yin.

annotations.canonicalSource: recalling pangu’s creation, the three sovereigns’ governance, and the five emperors’ establishment of order, the world was divided into four great continents: the east shengshen continent, the west niuhes continent, the south zanbu continent, and the north julu continent.

translations.targetText: Recalling Pangu’s creation, the Three Sovereigns’ governance, and the Five Emperors’ establishment of order, the world was divided into four great continents: the East Shengshen Continent, the West Niuhes Continent, the South Zanbu Continent, and the North Julu Continent.

annotations.canonicalSource: this book concerns itself with the east shengshen continent.

translations.targetText: This book concerns itself with the East Shengshen Continent.

annotations.canonicalSource: overseas lies a nation called the proud coming country.

translations.targetText: Overseas lies a nation called the Proud Coming Country.

annotations.canonicalSource: this nation is near the great sea; within the sea stands a famous mountain called flower-fruit mountain.

translations.targetText: This nation is near the great sea; within the sea stands a famous mountain called flower-fruit mountain.

annotations.canonicalSource: this mountain is the ancestral root of the ten continents and the dragon vein of the three islands, arising from the separation of clarity and turbidity, formed after the primal chaos.

translations.targetText: This mountain is the ancestral root of the Ten Continents and the dragon vein of the Three Islands, arising from the separation of clarity and turbidity, formed after the primal chaos.

annotations.canonicalSource: truly a magnificent mountain!

translations.targetText: Truly a magnificent mountain!

annotations.canonicalSource: there is a poem confirming this.

translations.targetText: There is a poem confirming this.

annotations.canonicalSource: the poem says:

translations.targetText: The poem says:

annotations.canonicalSource: atop the mountain, there is a divine stone.

translations.targetText: Atop the mountain, there is a divine stone.

annotations.canonicalSource: the stone stands three zhang, six chi, and five cun tall, and has a circumference of two zhang and four chi.

translations.targetText: The stone stands three zhang, six chi, and five cun tall, and has a circumference of two zhang and four chi.

annotations.canonicalSource: its height of three zhang six chi five cun corresponds to the 365 degrees of the celestial circle; its circumference of two zhang four chi aligns with the twenty-four solar terms.

translations.targetText: Its height of three zhang six chi five cun corresponds to the 365 degrees of the celestial circle; its circumference of two zhang four chi aligns with the twenty-four solar terms.

annotations.canonicalSource: it has nine apertures and eight holes, corresponding to the nine palaces and the eight trigrams.

translations.targetText: It has nine apertures and eight holes, corresponding to the Nine Palaces and the Eight Trigrams.

annotations.canonicalSource: no trees shade it on any side; rather, orchid and fragrant herbs accompany it on the left and right.

annotations.canonicalSource: since the time of creation, it has received the essence of heaven and earth, the essence of the sun and moon; so long was the inspiration that it developed intelligence and awareness.

translations.targetText: Since the time of creation, it has received the essence of Heaven and Earth, the essence of the sun and moon; so long was the inspiration that it developed intelligence and awareness.

annotations.canonicalSource: within it nurtured a celestial embryo, which one day cracked open, producing a stone egg about the size of a round ball.

translations.targetText: Within it nurtured a celestial embryo, which one day cracked open, producing a stone egg about the size of a round ball.

annotations.canonicalSource: blown by the wind, it transformed into a stone monkey, complete with facial features and limbs.

translations.targetText: Blown by the wind, it transformed into a stone monkey, complete with facial features and limbs.

annotations.canonicalSource: it immediately learned to crawl and walk, paying respects to all directions.

translations.targetText: It immediately learned to crawl and walk, paying respects to all directions.

annotations.canonicalSource: its eyes emitted two beams of golden light, shooting toward the dipper constellation.

translations.targetText: Its eyes emitted two beams of golden light, shooting toward the Dipper constellation.

annotations.canonicalSource: this startled the jade emperor, the highest deity, who sat upon the golden palace in the cloud palace in the lingxiao hall. he summoned his celestial ministers, and upon seeing the flaming golden light, ordered the thousand-mile eye and the swift wind ear to open the southern heavenly gate and watch.

translations.targetText: This startled the Jade Emperor, the highest deity, who sat upon the Golden Palace in the Cloud Palace in the Lingxiao Hall. He summoned his celestial ministers, and upon seeing the flaming golden light, ordered the Thousand-Mile Eye and the Swift Wind Ear to open the Southern Heavenly Gate and watch.

annotations.canonicalSource: the two generals dutifully went outside; what they saw was clear, what they heard was distinct.

translations.targetText: The two generals dutifully went outside; what they saw was clear, what they heard was distinct.

annotations.canonicalSource: they soon returned and reported: “by imperial order, the golden light we observed is at the border of the proud coming kingdom in the east shengshen continent, atop flower-fruit mountain stands a divine stone that produced an egg, which in the wind transformed into a stone monkey. there, it pays respects to all directions and its eyes emit golden rays shooting at the dipper constellation.

translations.targetText: They soon returned and reported: “By imperial order, the golden light we observed is at the border of the Proud Coming Kingdom in the East Shengshen Continent, atop flower-fruit mountain stands a divine stone that produced an egg, which in the wind transformed into a stone monkey. There, it pays respects to all directions and its eyes emit golden rays shooting at the Dipper constellation.

annotations.canonicalSource: now it feeds on water and food, and the golden light is about to fade.”

translations.targetText: Now it feeds on water and food, and the golden light is about to fade.”

annotations.canonicalSource: the jade emperor graciously bestowed mercy and said: “the beings below are born from the essence of heaven and earth; there is nothing unusual.”

annotations.canonicalSource: this monkey, living in the mountain, learned to walk and leap, fed on grass and trees, drank spring water, picked mountain flowers, and gathered tree fruits; it kept company with wolves and insects, roamed in groups with tigers and leopards, befriended deer and antelopes, and was close to macaques; it slept beneath stone cliffs at night and travelled among caves and peaks by day.

translations.targetText: This monkey, living in the mountain, learned to walk and leap, fed on grass and trees, drank spring water, picked mountain flowers, and gathered tree fruits; it kept company with wolves and insects, roamed in groups with tigers and leopards, befriended deer and antelopes, and was close to macaques; it slept beneath stone cliffs at night and travelled among caves and peaks by day.

annotations.canonicalSource: at the center there is a stone tablet inscribed in regular script with the large characters: “flower-fruit mountain blessed land, water curtain cave celestial grotto.”

annotations.canonicalSource: the stone monkey said, “there is no water! no water!”

translations.targetText: The stone monkey said, “There is no water! No water!”

annotations.canonicalSource: “it is actually an iron-plate bridge, and beyond the bridge is a home made by heaven and earth.”

annotations.canonicalSource: “inside it is spacious enough to hold hundreds of old and young.”

annotations.canonicalSource: “we shall all move in and live here, avoiding the hardships of the sky.”

annotations.canonicalSource: you just said whoever can enter and exit unharmed shall be crowned king.

translations.targetText: You just said whoever can enter and exit unharmed shall be crowned king.

annotations.canonicalSource: i have just gone in and out several times, and found this heavenly place for you all to rest peacefully and enjoy your own homes; why not crown me king?”

annotations.canonicalSource: the troop heard and knelt obediently, lining up to pay ritual respects, each proclaiming “long live the great king.”

translations.targetText: The troop heard and knelt obediently, lining up to pay ritual respects, each proclaiming “Long live the great king.”

annotations.canonicalSource: there is a poem to confirm this.

annotations.canonicalSource: they roamed flower-fruit mountain by day and stayed in the water curtain cave by night, united and harmonious, avoiding flocks of birds and wild beasts alike, ruling themselves happily.

translations.targetText: They roamed flower-fruit mountain by day and stayed in the water curtain cave by night, united and harmonious, avoiding flocks of birds and wild beasts alike, ruling themselves happily.

annotations.canonicalSource: thus:

translations.targetText: Thus:

annotations.canonicalSource: the handsome monkey king enjoyed heaven's innocence, anticipating three to five hundred years of happiness.

translations.targetText: The handsome monkey king enjoyed heaven's innocence, anticipating three to five hundred years of happiness.

annotations.canonicalSource: one day, amid joyous feasting with the troop, sudden worry came and tears fell.

translations.targetText: One day, amid joyous feasting with the troop, sudden worry came and tears fell.

annotations.canonicalSource: the troop hurriedly approached, bowing and asking, “great king, why the distress?”

translations.targetText: The troop hurriedly approached, bowing and asking, “Great king, why the distress?”

annotations.canonicalSource: the monkey king said, “though in joy, i bear a slight distant worry, hence my distress.”

translations.targetText: The monkey king said, “Though in joy, I bear a slight distant worry, hence my distress.”

annotations.canonicalSource: the troop laughed and said, “king, you are truly not content.

translations.targetText: The troop laughed and said, “King, you are truly not content.

annotations.canonicalSource: we gather every day in joyous meetings, on this immortal mountain blessed land, ancient divine land, not under the yoke of qilin nor phoenix, nor under human kingly rule, free and unrestrained, enjoying boundless blessings — why worry about distant troubles?”

translations.targetText: We gather every day in joyous meetings, on this immortal mountain blessed land, ancient divine land, not under the yoke of qilin nor phoenix, nor under human kingly rule, free and unrestrained, enjoying boundless blessings — why worry about distant troubles?”

annotations.canonicalSource: the monkey king said, "though i am in the midst of joy, i still have some distant concerns, and so i am troubled."

translations.targetText: The monkey king said, "Though I am in the midst of joy, I still have some distant concerns, and so I am troubled."

annotations.canonicalSource: the troop of monkeys laughed again and said, "king, you are truly not content."

translations.targetText: The troop of monkeys laughed again and said, "King, you are truly not content."

annotations.canonicalSource: "we gather daily in celebration, in the fairy mountains and blessed lands, ancient caves and divine isles. we obey neither the ruling of the qilin nor the control of the phoenix, nor are we bound by earthly kingship. we live freely and unrestrained—a boundless blessing. why then do you harbor distant worries and sorrow?"

translations.targetText: "We gather daily in celebration, in the fairy mountains and blessed lands, ancient caves and divine isles. We obey neither the ruling of the qilin nor the control of the phoenix, nor are we bound by earthly kingship. We live freely and unrestrained—a boundless blessing. Why then do you harbor distant worries and sorrow?"

annotations.canonicalSource: the monkey king said, "though today we are not subject to the human king's laws, nor fear the authority of beasts, in old age, when blood weakens, under the secret governance of king yan, once life ends, would it not be a pointless existence in this world, unable to remain long among heaven and humans?”

translations.targetText: The monkey king said, "Though today we are not subject to the human king's laws, nor fear the authority of beasts, in old age, when blood weakens, under the secret governance of King Yan, once life ends, would it not be a pointless existence in this world, unable to remain long among heaven and humans?”

annotations.canonicalSource: upon hearing this, all the monkeys covered their faces and wept mournfully, deeply troubled by the impermanence of life.

translations.targetText: Upon hearing this, all the monkeys covered their faces and wept mournfully, deeply troubled by the impermanence of life.

annotations.canonicalSource: suddenly from the troop, a backward-facing ape leapt out, loudly shouting, "if the king really worries like this, it shows true awakening of the way.

translations.targetText: Suddenly from the troop, a backward-facing ape leapt out, loudly shouting, "If the king really worries like this, it shows true awakening of the Way.

annotations.canonicalSource: among the five types of beings, only three kinds—those of name and form—do not submit to king yan's control."

translations.targetText: Among the five types of beings, only three kinds—those of name and form—do not submit to King Yan's control."

annotations.canonicalSource: the monkey king asked, "do you know who those three kinds are?"

translations.targetText: The monkey king asked, "Do you know who those three kinds are?"

annotations.canonicalSource: the ape replied, "they are the buddha, immortal, and the divine, who escape the cycle of reincarnation, neither born nor dying, living as long as heaven, earth, and mountains."
